title: Senior Accounting & Billing Coordinator  (Remote) – Healthcare Operations
description:
Evergreen Rehab & Wellness | Greater Vancouver, BC, Canada



About Evergreen Rehab & Wellness 



Evergreen Rehab & Wellness is a leading multidisciplinary healthcare organization serving the 

Greater Vancouver area, with clinics located in Coquitlam, Surrey, Langley, and Burnaby 

(Brentwood). 



With a 4.9/5.0 patient satisfaction rating and a growing team of 70+ healthcare practitioners, 

we provide integrated healthcare services including: 

? Physiotherapy 

? Chiropractic Care 

? Registered Massage Therapy 

? Naturopathic Medicine 

? Kinesiology 

? Rehabilitation & Wellness Services

 

As our organization continues to grow, we are expanding our finance and operations team to 

support the increasing complexity of our clinics. 



Position Overview 



We are seeking a Senior Accounting & Billing Coordinator to support the financial operations 

of our healthcare clinics. 



This role is responsible for overseeing key accounting functions including billing reconciliation, 

financial reporting, contractor payment processing, insurance payment tracking, and 

operational financial analysis. 



The ideal candidate has strong accounting knowledge, high attention to detail, and experience 

managing financial workflows in a fast-paced organization. 



This position will work closely with clinic management and leadership to ensure financial 

accuracy, operational efficiency, and compliance with healthcare billing procedures. 



Key Responsibilities 

1. Insurance Billing & Revenue Monitoring 

? Monitor claim submissions for private insurance providers

? Track unsubmitted claims 

2. Billing & Claims Processing 

? Submit WSBC Invoices; Initial Reports and Extension Reports

? Ensure billing documentation is accurate and compliant 

? Identify billing discrepancies and coordinate corrections with clinic teams 

3. Financial Reporting & Analysis 

Prepare recurring operational and financial reports including: 

? Monthly EBITDA analysis

? Revenue and payment reconciliation reports 

? Operational performance tracking 

? Financial summaries for clinic leadership 

4. Independent Contractor Accounting 

? Prepare semi-monthly Independent Contractor payroll payments

? Update practitioner payment records 

? Reconcile practitioner revenue with billing records 

5. Tax & Compliance Support 

? Compile quarterly GST summaries

? Maintain accurate financial documentation for accounting and tax reporting 

? Assist with financial records required for external accounting review 

6. Insurance Payment Reconciliation 

? Monitor payments received from private insurers 

? Identify missing, delayed, or incorrect payments 

? Maintain organized payment tracking records 

7. Patient Scheduling Monitoring 

? Monitor unscheduled patients who have not booked recommended follow-up visits 

? Coordinate with clinic reception teams to support patient follow-up scheduling 

? Assist in maintaining continuity of patient care 



Compensation & Benefits 

? Full-time position (40 hours per week)

? Competitive monthly salary 

? 13th-month bonus after 12 months of successful employment 

? Fully remote work environment

? Professional development opportunities 

? Opportunity to grow within a fast-growing healthcare organization



Required Qualifications 

? 3–5+ years of accounting, finance, or billing experience

? Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel and financial reporting

? Excellent attention to detail and analytical skills

? Strong English communication skills 

? Ability to manage financial workflows independently in a remote environment 

? Experience managing accounts receivable and financial reconciliation



Preferred Qualifications 

? Experience in healthcare accounting or clinic billing

? Familiarity with Jane App or healthcare practice management systems

? Knowledge of ICBC, WorkSafeBC (WSBC), and private insurance billing processes

? Experience working with independent contractor compensation structures

? Multilingual abilities (Korean, Mandarin/Chinese, French, or Farsi) are considered an 

asset 



Work Environment 

? 100% remote role

? Structured onboarding and training 

? Support from the VA Manager and leadership team

? Collaborative and supportive team environment 

? Opportunities for long-term career growth

title: SEO Support Operator (Local SEO / Google Business / BrightLocal)  Compensation: $325/month (starting)

About Us



Create By Influence (CBI) is a fast-growing marketing systems company helping businesses generate leads and improve their local visibility.

We are scaling quickly and looking for a reliable, detail-oriented SEO Support Operator to help execute local SEO tasks across multiple client accounts.

title: Experienced Editorial Outreach Specialist
description:
Now Hiring: Experienced Editorial Outreach Specialist

Remote Position | Long-Term Opportunity

Are you an experienced, detail-oriented writer with a strong commitment to producing measurable media results? Are you seeking a stable remote role with long-term growth potential—one that rewards high-quality, publication-ready content and the ability to build strong journalist relationships?

SimplyMedia is seeking a highly skilled Remote Editorial Outreach Specialist to join our expanding team. We are looking for a professional who understands editorial standards and can consistently deliver fast, compelling, and quotable pitches in response to media queries (HARO, Featured, etc.) while cultivating positive journalist relationships.

A writing background and portfolio/sample submissions are required.



What You’ll Receive

* Starting Pay: $450 per month

* Performance Bonuses: Top-performing specialists can advance from $450 to up to $1,000 per month in under six months by meeting our quality and speed KPIs (details provided upon hire).

* Paid Holidays (Philippine Official Holidays) & Paid Time Off: Available after regularization based on consistent, excellent performance.

* Targeted Training Provided: We will train you in our outreach tools and strategies; you must bring the foundational writing ability.

* Annual Bonuses for high-performing tea
mbers.



Who We’re Looking For

* Non-Negotiable: Proven writing experience (1+ years preferred) with the ability to submit a portfolio or relevant writing samples (e.g., media pitches, articles, marketing copy).

* Exceptional Writing Ability: Superb command of written English, strong grammar, and excellent editorial judgment. All outputs must be publication-ready.

* Relationship-Oriented Professional: Experience communicating politely and professionally, with the ability to build long-term rapport with journalists.

* Strategic Thinker: Understanding of media relations, PR strategy, or SEO link building is a significant advantage. You should know how to pitch a compelling angle—not just promote a company.

* Fast, Focused, and Reliable: Ability to respond quickly and deliver high-quality content under tight deadlines (e.g., targeting submission within the first 50 responses).



Key Responsibilities

As a Remote Editorial Outreach Specialist, your primary focus will be generating media coverage through expert communication and strong relationship management:

* Craft Quotable Pitches: Write clear, concise, expert-level responses with strong soundbites and quotable insights reporters can use immediately.

* Strategic Outreach & Follow-Up: Manage query platforms (HARO, Featured, etc.), ensuring fast submissions and timely, professional follow-ups to build journalist relationships.

* Communication Management: Organize, research, and respond to media correspondence with clarity, professionalism, and a focus on maintaining positive rapport.

This is a long-term, fully remote position focused on content quality, measurable media outcomes, and professional relationship building.?Regularization to permanent status is based on consistently excellent performance.



If You’re a Dependable, Skilled Writer Who Thrives Under Pressure—We Want to Hear from You

Multiple positions available. 



Leave us a message first, then apply here:

title: Amazon online arbitrage / A2A / A2A EU virtual assistant (Minimum 1 year previous experience)
description:
***MINIMUM 1 YEAR EXPERIENCE IS A MUST, DO NOT APPLY IF YOU CANNOT SHOW ME PREVIOUS EXAMPLE LEADS. AS I WILL IGNORE YOUR APPLICATION***



Job Description:



We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Virtual Assistant from the Philippines to join our team on a full-time basis. The ideal candidate will have proven experience in Amazon online arbitrage sourcing for the UK market, a bonus would be having A2A sourcing skills and A2A EU sourcing skills this will make you stand out compared to the other candidates. If you have A2A experience please highlight this in your application as well as when you send over your previous example leads



We are currently in search of 2 full time virtual assistants



Having experience with Keepa product finder is a must as this is the tool we use to find majority of the leads as well as experience with Seller amp as this is what we use to analyse the deals



Responsibilities:

• Source unique, high-profit and medium-profit deals on Amazon UK, focusing on high-ticket niches such as electronics, home & kitchen, toys, Computers and accessories. (Anything with a sell price of above £50 NO MAKEUP) 

• Ensure all leads are exclusive and not shared with other clients.

• Deliver high-quality, consistent sourcing leads in a timely manner.

• Present leads in a well-organized Excel sheet format with all necessary data points (e.g., cost price, Amazon selling price, profit, ROI, ASIN, etc.).

• Using coupons and taking into account student discount etc when sourcing. 

•Source from unique websites and ensure they are legit and not scam websites by checking trustpilot



Requirements:

• Proven experience in Amazon online arbitrage sourcing for the UK market – this is non-negotiable.

• Must be able to provide examples of previous sourcing work.

• Each deal should have a minimum profit of £10 and a minimum ROI of 20%.

•No oversaturated brands/websites such as Ryobi, Milwaukee, notino and etc

• Must be reliable, detail-oriented, and trustworthy – we value loyalty and hard work, and we take care of our tea
mbers who are committed and dedicated.

• Strong communication skills and the ability to follow instructions independently.

• All leads must be exclusive and not reused or recycled across other clients.



If you’ve read this far and would like to apply, please use the word “Ready” in your application title so I know you have read and understood everything, without this title I will ignore your application. You must also apply with your previous work/example of deal sheet. Without this we will not read your application.



Must also be able to find 5-10 high quality leads a day within the specified criteria above. Your previous work/deal sheet should highlight this.



To get a better understanding of what we require I have attached a training proposal below, please ensure you read it thoroughly to understand our expectations 









Thank you I look forward to your applications and viewing your previous results



Salary will be discussed once you apply. Starting is £250 a month with performance based bonuses and base salary increase out our discretion.

title: Appointment Setter (B2B Cold Calling)
description:
* PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE DESCRIPTION BEFORE APPLYING *



IMPORTANT: We are only looking for someone with specifically B2B cold calling experience.  If you have only worked inbound leads, warm leads, or leads from an ad, please do not apply. 



----------  ----------  ----------  ----------  ----------



Hi — my name is Jordan, and I’m the founder of a company that helps small businesses never miss a call using an A.I. Receptionist. We help service businesses capture missed calls and turn them into real customers instead of losing them to competitors.



We are not a large corporate call center where employees are treated like numbers. We are looking for 1–2 experienced B2B cold callers who want a long-term role with the opportunity to make good money and grow with our business.



WHAT YOU WILL DO:

• Source B2B leads (small business owners)

• Make outbound cold calls

• Introduce our service in a clear and simple way

• Book qualified prospects for a free consultation

• Confirm that the appointments you book actually show up

• You do not close the deals, our team handles the sales calls. Your job is to start conversations and book quality appointments.



THIS ROLE IS A GOOD FIT IF YOU:

• Have real B2B cold calling experience

• Speak clear, confident English

• Have reliable internet and a quiet workspace

• Are comfortable making high-volume outbound calls

• Are consistent, disciplined, and reliable



COMPENSATION:

• $5 per hour base pay

• $25 for every attended appointment (show-up)

• $100 for every deal that closes

• Monthly performance bonuses available



HOURS:

• Part-time (20 hours per week) to start with the option to transition to full time

• Schedule: 1:00 AM – 5:00 AM Philippine Time



HOW TO APPLY:

• Please do not send a generic message or one written with chat GPT - those will be ignored.

• Do not mention previous jobs that are not specifically related to cold calling B2B

• Include the following 4 things in your application:

     1) How many months/years of experience do you have specifically cold calling B2B 

     2) Describe in detail your experience:  What service/product were you offering and to who

     3) How do you overcome a gate keeper to get in touch with the decision maker?

     4) Put "Dial And Smile" in the subject line.

title: Executive Assistant / Business Right Hand
description:
About the Role

I am looking for a highly versatile and reliable person to act as my right hand in managing multiple companies and projects. This is not a standard assistant role. You will be involved in a wide range of activities, from operations to marketing, and will be trusted to take ownership where needed.



Key Responsibilities

• Support daily business operations across multiple companies

• Assist with planning, coordination, and execution of projects

• Handle communication, scheduling, and follow-ups with partners, clients, and suppliers

• Research, prepare summaries, and provide recommendations for decision-making

• Monitor performance and report on key metrics

• Take initiative in solving problems and improving processes



What I’m Looking For

• Extremely versatile and adaptable, able to switch between different tasks and industries

• Strong organizational and communication skills

• Proactive, solution-oriented, and resourceful

• Able to work independently with little supervision

• Comfortable learning new tools, systems, and processes quickly

• Trustworthy and reliable, someone I can count on to keep things running smoothly



Bonus Skills (Big Plus if You Have Them)

• Hiring and managing freelancers or small teams

• Shopify store management and optimization

• Running and analyzing Meta 
/Instagram) ad campaigns

• Experience with project management tools like ClickUp, Trello, or Monday

• Marketing knowledge and campaign execution

• Business development and partnership building

• Copywriting and creating product descriptions that convert





Offer

• A dynamic role where you will learn directly fro
 and gain experience in multiple areas of business

• Base salary plus performance-related commission

• 36 hours per week

• Long-term growth opportunities



Application Questions



Give an example of a time when you had to take ownership of a project without clear instructions. What did you do and what was the result?



Which of the bonus skills listed do you have hands-on experience with? Describe briefly.

What’s the most complex business or project you’ve helped manage so far?



How quickly do you usually respond to messages during the day?

title: Meta Ads Launcher
description:
We are looking for a Meta Ads Launcher who knows exactly how to set up and launch campaigns that bring in results fast. You don’t need to be a full-funnel strategist, but you do need to be someone who can take an ad account, set up campaigns with the right structure, and get them live quickly.



What you’ll do:

• Set up and launch Meta 
 & Instagram) ad campaigns.

• Apply best practices for campaign structure, audiences, and placements.

• Troubleshoot technical issues in Ads Manager.

• Communicate clearly about campaign status and performance.



What we’re looking for:

• Strong experience in Meta Ads Manager.

• Ability to set up campaigns from scratch without guidance.

• Detail-oriented and fast execution.

• Fluent in English (spoken & written).





A few questions to answer in your application:

title: FULL-TIME VIDEO EDITOR - eCommerce ADS & Short-form Content
description:
ABOUT US

We are a fast-growing ecommerce company operating multiple brands across Beauty & Skincare, Fitness & Apparel, Home & Kitchen, Tech & Gadgets, and more. We launch new brands regularly and move fast. 

Our content pipeline never stops — and neither do we.



We sell primarily across Europe, meaning our ads run in multiple native languages including but not limited to English, German, French, Swedish, Norwegian, Danish, Finnish and more. This is a core part of the role — not an occasional task.



We are looking for a talented, self-driven Video Editor who can produce high-converting short-form content every single day without needing to be micromanaged. 

If you thrive in a fast-paced environment, have strong creative instincts, and understand what makes someone stop scrolling and buy — this role was made for you.



YOUR ROLE

As our dedicated Full-Time Video Editor, you will be responsible for producing 3–5 polished, ready-to-publish video ads per day across our brand portfolio, localized for European markets.



Your daily output will include:

- Short-form product ads for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

- UGC-style and AI UGC ads designed for paid traffic

- AI avatar videos using tools like Heygen, Arcads, or similar platforms

- AI voiceovers in multiple European languages (German, French, Spanish, Italian, Dutch, etc.)

- Localized captions and on-screen text in the correct native language for each market

- Animated captions, motion graphics, and branded text overlays

- Color-graded, sound-designed content that feels professional and scroll-stopping

- This is a fully remote, async role. You own your schedule — but you own your deadlines too.



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

- 2+ years of video editing experience with a strong focus on ecommerce or paid ads

- Proven ability to produce 3–5 complete video ads per day at consistent quality

- Experience generating AI voiceovers in multiple languages using tools like ElevenLabs, Heygen, or similar

- Ability to produce accurate, properly formatted captions and on-screen text in European languages

- Expert knowledge of animated captions, subtitle styling, and motion graphics

- Strong understanding of hooks — you know how to win the first 3 seconds

- Hands-on experience with AI UGC and AI avatar tools (Heygen, Arcads, D-ID, etc.)

- Solid color grading and sound design skills

- Creative independence — no style guides, no hand-holding, you bring the vision

- Reliable async communicator who hits deadlines and flags issues early

- Experience across multiple ad formats: UGC, VSL, mini-VSL, unboxing, testimonial, AI avatar



WHAT WE OFFER

- Stable, long-term full-time employment

- 100% remote — work from anywhere

- Fully async — own your hours, just deliver on time

- Exposure to multiple exciting niches and new brand launches across Europe

- Creative freedom — your style, your instincts, your work

- A fast-moving team that rewards output and initiative

- Real growth opportunity as our portfolio of brands expands



HOW TO APPLY

Answer every question below in full. Applications with incomplete answers or no portfolio will not be reviewed. There are no right or wrong answers — we want to understand exactly who you are, how you work, and what you bring to the table.



APPLICATION QUESTIONS

1. Have you worked for a fast-paced ecommerce or dropshipping company before?

If yes, describe the company, your role, and how many videos you produced per week.



2. How many finished, ready-to-publish video ads can you realistically deliver per day?

Be honest. We value consistency over promises.



3. Are you available to work full-time (40 hours/week) and commit to this role long-term?

We are looking for a dedicated tea
mber, not a freelancer juggling multiple clients.



4. Which AI tools do you have hands-on experience with?

List every tool you have actually used — e.g. Heygen, Arcads, D-ID, ElevenLabs, Runway, CapCut AI, Pika, etc. Do not list tools you have only heard of.



5. Have you worked with AI voiceovers in multiple languages before?

If yes, which tools did you use and which languages have you produced content in? Give specific examples.



6. On a scale of 1–10, how would you rate your video editing skills and why?

Be specific. What are you genuinely great at, and what are you still developing?



7. Which of the following ad formats have you personally produced? 

List all that apply and give a brief example for each:

VSL · Mini VSL · UGC-style · AI UGC · AI Avatar ads · Unboxing videos · Professional/branded ads · Testimonial ads · Short-form hook ads



8. What are your greatest strengths as a video editor working in ecommerce?

Think beyond technical skills — include your work ethic, communication style, and creative approach.



9. What type of video ads are you most experienced with, and which ones perform best from your experience?

Tell us what formats you have seen convert well and why you think they worked.



10. What editing software do you use and how proficient are you in each?

List your primary tool and any secondary tools. Include your proficiency level — beginner / intermediate / advanced / expert.



11. Please share your portfolio.



Provide a link to your best ecommerce or ad work (Google Drive, Notion, personal website, or similar). If you have a specific AI UGC, AI avatar, or multilingual ad example, include it separately. Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.



Best Regards Mikael

title: AI Video Editor & TikTok Automation Specialist (Full-Time)
description:
We are looking for a tech-savvy and creative AI Video Editor to join our team for a long-term project. We manage a large-scale network of over 200 TikTok accounts in the USA market (Dark NPC / MONTA niche). Your job is to create high-engaging AI videos and ensure they are technically modified so TikTok’s algorithm treats them as 100% unique content.

Daily Tasks:

AI Content Creation: Generate 8 high-quality AI videos daily using tools like HeyGen, Kling, Runway, or similar AI video generators.

Video "Unique-ification": You must process these videos so they can be posted on hundreds of accounts without being flagged as "Unoriginal Content."

Technical Editing: * Perfor
tadata Scrubbing (removing all EXIF and device data).

Apply Pixel Manipulation (Mirroring, subtle zooming, color grading, and speed ramping at 1.02x).

Change the MD5 Hash of every file.

Mass Processing: Use tools like FFmpeg or batch-editing in Premiere/CapCut to create 200 unique variations of each master clip.

Requirements:

Expertise in AI Video generation (please specify which tools you use).

Deep understanding of TikTok's Algorithm (specifically how to bypass the "Unoriginal Content" and "QR Code" flags).

Proficient in FFmpeg or the ability to learn it quickly for automation.

Knowledge of US Mobile Proxies and how to avoid IP-detection is a big plus.

Reliable high-speed internet and a powerful PC for video rendering.

title: Bookkeeper (Required to have an AU experience)
description:
Role Purpose

The Bookkeeper is responsible for the end-to-end delivery of core transactional finance processes, including accounts payable, bank reconciliations, corporate cards, payroll processing, and financial data administration. This role is critical to the smooth running of the finance function, ensuring accurate, timely, high-quality financial processing that supports strong reporting, compliance, and organizational decision-making.



Role Responsibilities

A. Accounts Payable:

Process all supplier invoices, employee & volunteer expense claims, ensuring correct coding, approvals, GST treatment, currency, and documentation.

Manage the AP inbox and triage queries.

Maintain accurate supplier records, including bank details and documentation checks.

Prepare AP batches in line with cut-off timelines and approval workflows.

Conduct first-pass AP review before Management Accountant review (accuracy, completeness, coding).

Reconcile AP accounts and investigate variances.



B. Accounts Receivable:

Prepare and send invoices to partners, funders, and internal stakeholders.

Maintain AR schedules and follow up on outstanding amounts.

Reconcile AR balances and ensure all receipts are allocated.



C. Corporate Credit Cards:

Manage card issuance, cancellations, limits, and user onboarding.

Review monthly card claims, ensuring receipts, coding, and notes are provided.

Follow up late claims and unresolved discrepancies.

Reconcile company card accounts and ensure accurate EOM processing.



D. Payroll:

Prepare and process fortnightly payroll in line with contracts, and organisational policies.

Maintain employee master data with Xero, ensuring accuracy of bank details, tax information, superannuation, and entitlements.

Process new starters, changes, terminations, and pay adjustments.

Reconcile payroll reports, checking for variance and anomalies.

Prepare workpapers for superannuation payments, payroll journals, and leave reconciliations.

Work with P&E to ensure payroll accuracy, and timely updates to employee records.



E. Bank Reconciliation:

Complete daily and monthly bank reconciliations across all accounts.

Investigate and resolve unreconciled transactions.

Ensure all receipts, payments, and transfers are accurately recorded.



F. End of Month Processes:

Draft prepayments, accruals, apportionments, and routine journals.

Prepare EOM workpapers to a standard ready for first review.

Ensure all transactional processing is complete before close deadlines.

Maintain high-quality data hygiene to support forecasting, reporting, and analysis.



G. Data Entry and Record Keeping:

Maintain accurate, organised financial files and documentation for audit readiness.

Ensure data entry is correct, complete, and aligned with financial policies and accounting standards.

Support system updates, automation improvements, and process changes.



H. General Administrative Support:

Provide customer-focused support to internal stakeholders on finance and payroll queries.

Assist the Finance Team during peak periods (audit, EOFY, EOM, etc).

Participate in continuous improvement projects.

Contribute to team discussions on process optimisation, automation, and better ways of working.



Key Skills and Experience

-Experience in a finance support, accounts, or payroll role.

-Solid understanding of accounts payable, accounts receivable, and payroll processes.

-Proficient with Microsoft Excel and Google Sheets.

-Experience with accounting software (Xero preferred).

-Strong numeracy and data-entry accuracy.

-Understanding of basic accounting and payroll principles.

-High attention to detail and ability to deliver consistent accuracy.

-Excellent time management and ability to work to tight deadlines.

-Strong communication and customer service skills.

-Ability to work independently and take ownership of tasks.

-Comfortable with change, learning, and improving processes.

-Ability to handle confidential information with integrity and discretion.

-Certificate, Diploma, or Degree in Accounting, Finance, Business, or related field

title: Offer Architect / Direct Response Expert
description:
We are a global media company with a fast-growing Direct Response division. We create offers across Nutra, Dating, Survival, BizOpp, Finance, and Personal Development. Our work touches platforms like ClickBank, Digistore, Meta, YouTube, Native, and TikTok. We already have an amazing team in Manila and are now expanding.



We are hiring a REMOTE PH-based Offer Architect / Direct Response Copywriter, available part-time or full-time. This role is for someone who understands real DR fundamentals—offer architecture, VSL storytelling, big ideas, unique mechanisms, emotional triggers, and high-converting funnel structures—not traditional branding.



You will help shape complete offers from start to finish: big idea ? mechanism ? angles ? hooks ? VSL structure ? presells ? upsells. If you have experience in any direct response vertical, you’re welcome to apply.



Your responsibilities include:



• Creating offer architectures and mechanism-based positioning

• Writing long-form VSLs (8k–20k words) in clear Grade-5 English

• Building presell pages, advertorials, quiz funnels, and upsell paths

• Developing hook libraries, angle matrices, and curiosity-driven opens

• Collaborating with media buyers to optimize CPA, AOV, EPC, and funnel flow

• Studying competitor funnels and reverse engineering winners

• Creating compliant cold-traffic messaging for Meta & YouTube

• Using DR frameworks (RMBC, Agora principles, Todd Brown USP)

• Working with AI tools for research, ideation, and B-roll briefing



We offer long-term stability, weekly pay, and the chance to grow inside a global media ecosystem with a strong presence in Manila. You’ll join a supportive performance team that values speed, clarity, creativity, and execution.



If you have real DR experience and want to work on ambitious, high-impact offers, we would love to meet you.

title: eCommerce Junior CRO Specialist
description:
As a Junior CRO Specialist at CRO Gurus, you will be the key link between data-driven optimization strategy and tangible client results. This is a CRO-first role focused on experimentation, analytics, and user behavior — not digital marketing execution.



You will be a vital part of the client team, working closely under a Senior Strategist to help build a clear, evidence-based testing roadmap. You will manage the day-to-day details of project execution, support client communications, and drive action items to completion. We use smart systems and lean processes to accelerate analysis, freeing you up to focus on high-level strategy and building incredible client relationships.



About CRO Gurus: Our Mission & Culture



CRO Gurus is a fast-moving, fully remote team specializing in Conversion Rate Optimization. We are committed to delivering measurable ROI for our clients by identifying the "why" behind user behavior and executing intelligent A/B testing roadmaps.



We've built our culture to empower professionals who thrive on impact and autonomy.

Full-Lifecycle Exposure: This isn't a siloed role. You will work directly with a senior mentor and be exposed to the entire client lifecycle, from strategic hypothesis to final report, contributing to real client outcomes.

Strategic Speed: We prioritize moving quickly while making intelligent, data-informed decisions. You are empowered to take initiative, ensuring your time is spent on high-impact strategy.



Key Responsibilities:



Implement Data-Driven Strategy: Assist Senior Strategists with comprehensive website audits, analyze user behavior, and support the creation of customized A/B testing roadmaps based on data-driven insights.

Own Project Execution: Manage the day-to-day details of the Asana board, translating the team's strategic plan into an executed project. You will track and update tasks, timelines, and milestones to ensure timely delivery.

Support Client Relationships: Act as a reliable daily point of contact. Support senior strategists on client calls, help prepare findings, and learn how to build strong, effective partnerships.

Report & Track Business Impact: Monitor and analyze A/B testing results, helping to compile regular reports with actionable insights that summarize clear business impact and ROI.



What We’re Looking For:

We are seeking a proactive and detail-oriented professional with a high-ownership mentality:



- Experience: 1–2 years of experience in Conversion Rate Optimization, Analytics, eCommerce optimization, or experimentation-focused roles — OR a strong portfolio of CRO-related projects.

- Exceptional Organization: Strong organizational skills; you are proactive, detail-oriented, and comfortable keeping a project's tasks on track. Proficiency with tools like Asana is a huge plus.

- Confident Communicator: Excellent communication skills, with the confidence and desire to support client-facing meetings.

- Foundational Analytics Skills: Required understanding of Google Analytics 4. Familiarity with heatmapping and A/B testing tools is a major bonus, but we are willing to train the right candidate.

- Mindset: A strong passion for delivering measurable results and an intelligent approach to problem-solving.



What You'll Get (Benefits & Compensation):

Dedicated Growth Time: 10% of your weekly paid hours are reserved for learning and upskilling, ensuring you remain an expert in the field.

Remote Flexibility: Join our fast-moving, fully remote team.

Direct Impact: Work on a lean, intelligent team where your work has a direct, measurable impact on client success.

Compensation: Up to 420 per hour for the most qualified profiles.



Our Recruiting Process:

Apply: Submit your application here, and fill in the application form:


/AWSZWWo1jZmMTMJdkYt1Db



Important:

We prioritize candidates who can demonstrate hands-on CRO or experimentation experience (even from personal or side projects). Generic digital marketing backgrounds without CRO exposure are unlikely to be a fit.



1. Skillset Interview: If you qualify, we will contact you to schedule a 40–60 minute skillset interview.

2. Paid Skill Test.

3. In-depth Interview.

4. Offer.

title: QC Photo Editor VA for Real Estate Media
description:
Virtual Assistant for QC & Final Photo Touch-Ups (Part-Time, Long-Term)

We’re hiring a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant with strong photo editing experience to ensure our real estate photos look perfect before delivery. You’ll be performing minor corrections and final touch-ups on photos already processed by AutoHDR.



This is a long-term part-time role (12 hrs/week) with flexible hours, but we need at least 2 hours overlap with U.S. mornings (EST).



What You'll Do:

-Take photos processed by AutoHDR and import them to Lightroom

-Perform final touch-ups: straighten verticals, correct wall colors, remove objects, minor exposure/color tweaks

-Export final images

-Upload photos, floor plans, 3D tours, and videos to HDPhotoHub

-Ensure everything is organized and delivered on time



What You Need:

-Solid Lightroom & Photoshop skills (you’ll be doing final tweaks, not full editing)

-Strong attention to detail in photo selection and visual quality

-Willing to follow detailed SOPs and take initiative when needed

-Availability during U.S. EST mornings for handoff and communication

-Strong written English



Bonus Points For:

-Experience with HDPhotoHub, AutoHDR, Dropbox

-Real estate media experience

title: Cloud & Endpoint Support Engineer (Tier 2)
description:
Role Overview

The Cloud & Endpoint Support Engineer (Tier 2) is responsible for day-to-day endpoint operations and Microsoft 365 support across multiple client environments. This is a hands-on role focused on consistent execution, endpoint hygiene, patching, troubleshooting, and clear documentation. 



Key Responsibilities 

• Administer Microsoft 365 and core Azure/Entra ID services (user/mailbox management, Conditional Access changes, retention and mailbox policies). 

• Configure and manage Intune, Autopilot, Group Policy, application deployments, and configuration baselines. 

• Execute scheduled Windows and third-party patching, including reporting and remediation. 

• Monitor and maintain endpoint security baselines and EDR/RMM agents (e.g., SentinelOne, Arctic Wolf, NinjaOne). 

• Troubleshoot endpoint, mail flow, DNS, authentication (SPF, DKIM, DMARC), and basic firewall issues. 

• Resolve Tier 2 escalations and collaborate with senior engineers for complex i
. 

• Maintain runbooks for onboarding/offboarding, device builds, patching, and routine maintenance. 

• Use PowerShell for basic automation, validation, and reporting. 

• Document all work clearly and accurately. 

• Serve as the primary, hands-on owner of scheduled maintenance windows—executing, validating, and documenting patching and maintenance activities—and perform emergency after-hours changes as required. 



Qualifications 

• 3–5 years of experience supporting Microsoft 365 and Windows endpoints. 

• Strong hands-on experience with Intune, Autopilot, Group Policy, and patching workflows. 

• Experience with EDR/RMM tools in a support capacity. 

• Solid troubleshooting and documentation skills. 

• Clear and professional communication skills.

We manage unique properties in markets like Wisconsin Dells, Baraboo, and Lake Delton. Our focus is simple: quality, organization, and continuous improvement.

Systems and efficiency

mbers to verify and implement updates.

Airbnb / VRBO



Google Workspace



Slack

Who This Is Perfect For

Enjoys working with systems, tools, and organization



Is tech-savvy and learns new platforms quickly

Enjoys turning ideas into finished, structured processes



Important Requirements

Reliable internet and work setup

title: HR Talent Partner (Marketing & Growth) – HYPETRIBE Portfolio Companies
description:
Talent Partner (Marketing & Growth) – HYPETRIBE Portfolio Companies

Remote (Manila-based) · Occasional meetings in BGC



HYPETRIBE is a US-based venture studio that builds and scales multiple portfolio companies across performance marketing, SaaS, AI, automation, and digital products. Our companies move fast, test aggressively, and care deeply about execution quality.



Because of that, hiring matters a lot. One wrong hire can slow an entire team down. One strong hire can compound results for months or years.



We are not looking for traditional HR.

We are looking for someone who understands how real marketing and product teams work and can help us consistently bring in the right people.



This role is a Talent Partner focused on scouting, screening, and placing talent across multiple HYPETRIBE portfolio companies. You will work closely with founders and team leads who are operators, not corporate managers.



You do not need to use marketing tools, ad platforms, or AI systems yourself. But you must understand how these roles differ in practice. You should clearly know the difference between a junior and a senior media buyer, between a product manager and a venture builder, and between a designer who can actually execute and one who only looks good on a CV.



Judgment matters more here than process.



This role is a strong fit for someone who has recruited for marketing agencies, startups, or performance-driven teams before. You should be comfortable looking at a CV or portfolio and quickly telling whether the experience is real or just buzzwords.



You should also be comfortable saying no. Not every candidate is good enough, and protecting standards is part of the job. Rate negotiation is part of the job as well — done firmly, respectfully, and with the long-term health of the company in mind.



You will recruit across a wide range of roles depending on what our portfolio companies need at the time. This includes performance marketing and growth roles like media buyers, funnel builders, and conversion specialists. It also includes product and design roles such as product managers, venture builders, and UI/UX or product designers. In addition, you will work on AI-enabled and content-driven roles like video editors, AI-assisted designers, and content creators using modern tools.



You are not expected to master these tools. What matters is your ability to pre-qualify candidates correctly and spot real potential early.



On a day-to-day level, you will source and scout candidates across multiple platforms, review CVs and portfolios critically, and conduct first-round screening interviews. Your goal is to shortlist only candidates who are genuinely worth a founder’s time.



You will coordinate interviews with founders and team leads, manage hiring pipelines clearly, and handle compensation discussions within defined ranges. Over time, you will also build long-term relationships with strong candidates, even when there is no immediate opening.



This is not an admin role.

We are not looking for someone who forwards candidates without proper screening, avoids difficult conversations about money, or treats recruiting as a checklist task.



We are looking for someone with high emotional intelligence, strong loyalty to the venture studio and its portfolio companies, and a long-term mindset. Someone who understands that protecting hiring standards and costs is just as important as filling roles.



The role is fully remote and Manila-based. The BGC office is used only for weekly or occasional in-person meetings. Working hours are flexible and depend on hiring activity rather than fixed shifts.



Compensation is not listed publicly. Please include your monthly salary expectation in your application.



When applying, please share the types of roles you have recruited for before and the kinds of companies, agencies, or industries you have worked with. If you want, you can also include a short example of a difficult or high-impact hire you successfully closed.



This role has real influence.

Hiring the wrong people slows everything down.

title: Ad Creative Speacilist
description:
We are looking for an Ad Creative Specialist to help us create better-performing ads for Machete Muay Thai.

This role is for someone who understands that good creative is not about making things look “nice.” It is about making ads that stop attention, speak to the right person, create emotion, and drive action.



You will be responsible for helping turn our offers, customer pain points, brand voice, and footage into ad creatives that are clear, sharp, and built to convert.



You should be strong in:

Writing hooks and ad copy

Creating ad angles from a clear avatar

Structuring video and image ad concepts

Understanding what makes people stop scrolling

Matching creative to the offer and market awareness level

Testing variations instead of guessing

Following brand tone without watering it down



This is not for someone who needs constant hand-holding or just wants to make “content.”

We want someone who can think, create, test, improve, and bring ideas to the table.



What you will be doing

Creating ad concepts for paid social campaigns

Writing hooks, headlines, primary text, and CTA variations

Turning raw ideas, offers, and footage into ad briefs

Researching the target market and identifying strong angles

Creating multiple variations for testing

Reviewing winning and losing creatives to improve output

Working within the Machete Muay Thai brand voice and standards

Helping us produce creatives that attract beginners, locals, and people ready for structure and change



What we are looking for

Strong understanding of direct response ad creative

Ability to write clearly and persuasively

Good instinct for hooks, pain points, objections, and emotion

Experience with Meta-style ad creatives is preferred

Ability to follow direction while still bringing ideas

Fast turnaround and strong communication

High attention to detail

Someone who cares about performance, not just aesthetics



To apply

Please do not send a generic application.

We want to see how you think.



Send through:

A short introduction video about who you are and your experience

Examples of ad creatives or copy you have made before

Any results you can share from past campaigns

Why you think you would be a good fit for this role

Your rate and availability



Application task

Please also complete the following test task:

Using the avatar of a beginner male in Penrith who feels unfit, lacks structure, and wants to do something that actually challenges him, create:

3 different ad hooks

2 ad angles

1 short primary text ad

1 video ad concept

1 image ad concept



Your work should feel direct, clear, and built for conversion, not fluffy or generic.



Important

We are looking for someone who can understand the difference between:

brand content vs ad creative

pretty vs persuasive

random ideas vs strategic angles

posting vs converting

If that sounds like you, apply properly.

title: Digital Marketing Manager
description:
Description

We are a US-based company seeking trained professionals based in the Philippines. Apex Health Management Group work directly with our clients to virtually help with their business office needs.

Our Digital Marketing Managers work with small businesses based in the USA.

We help our clients improve workflow, save time, and remove the burden of editing and producing digital content, allowing them to focus on future products and project planning.

Our goal is to help you succeed in this up-and-coming field of Multimedia Virtual Assisting. Join the Apex Health Management family and apply today!

Responsibilities:

Responsibilities may include one or a combination of the following. You do not need experience in all areas to be a strong candidate.

• Digital Marketing: Developing digital marketing strategies, running ad campaigns on platforms like Google,
, Instagram, and TikTok, and optimizing performance based on key metrics.

• Content Creation: Producing engaging and relevant materials such as blog posts, articles, social media content, graphics, and website copy.

• Social Media Management: Planning content calendars, creating social media strategies, and engaging with online communities.

• Search Engine Optimization (SEO): Conducting keyword research, optimizing web content for search engines, and analyzing performance to improve rankings.

• Photo & Video Editing: Editing photos and videos to produce visually appealing marketing materials.

• Audio Editing: Enhancing and editing audio for clarity and quality.

• Graphic Design: Designing visuals for both digital and print media while maintaining brand identity.

• Other Multimedia Skills: Motion graphics, animation, 2D/3D modeling, digital illustration, and voiceovers.

• Web Design: Building user-friendly and visually appealing websites.

• Web Development: Creating websites with expertise in front-end and/or back-end development.

• Administrative/Ad Hoc Tasks: Coordinating and communicating with clients via
, phone, or task management tools.

Requirements

Qualifications:

• At least a University school graduate.

• Minimum of 3 year of relevant professional experience, or 2 years of freelancing experience.

• Strong English speaking and writing skills, with the ability to communicate effectively with US-based clients via chat, phone, or video calls.

• Proficiency in at least one of the following tools:

o Video/Audio: Final Cut Pro, Adobe Premiere, Avid, Adobe Audition, Pro Tools, Logic Pro, Ableton Live, Reason, FL Studio.

o Image: Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Illustrator, Adobe Lightroom, Procreate, 3Ds Max, Maya, ZBrush.

o Social Media: Meta Business Suite, Buffer, Hootsuite, HubSpot, SocialPilot, Loomly.

Benefits

Work From Home

Have the ability to work from the comfort of your own home. No more commuting; spend more time with your family and friends



Long-Term Work Relationship

You will work with the same client or client groups consistently, leading to the development of a long-lasting work relationship

title: Shopify Webmaster / Developer (Project-based ? Full-time)
description:
We are aggressively scaling a portfolio of Shopify stores and need a highly autonomous Shopify expert to build stores end to end. You receive a reference site, you deliver a complete ready-to-launch store. No micromanagement, no hand-holding — we need someone who owns their work completely.



We currently need 1 store per month and are scaling to 3 to 6 stores per month fast. If you are good, we will keep you very busy.



What you will do



- Build Shopify stores from A to Z based on reference sites we provide

- Work exclusively with Prestige and Shrine Pro themes

- Install, configure, and troubleshoot all required Shopify apps

- Deliver fast, clean, conversion-optimized stores on deadline

- Scale with us as volume increases



What we need from you



- Expert-level knowledge of Prestige and Shrine Pro themes — non-negotiable

- Proven ability to replicate and build stores from scratch independently

- Comfortable using AI tools to work faster and smarter

- Zero need for micromanagement — you execute, you deliver

- Strong portfolio with live Shopify store links — mandatory, no exceptions

- 2+ years of hands-on Shopify development experience



What we offer

- $600 to $1,000/month based on experience and results 

- Open to freelance project-based or full-time — we adapt to the right person

- Steady and growing volume — 1 store now, 3 to 6 per month as we scale

- Async work, flexible hours, Philippine timezone

- Communication via WhatsApp

- Payment via Wise, on time every time

- Onboarding directly with one of the founders or our operations lead



Portfolio with live store links is mandatory. If your application does not include a portfolio, it will not be reviewed. If you are good, we will keep you busy.

title: Senior Cloud Engineer
description:
With over 25-years of operations, we have built a team of futurist thinkers who have become one of the foremost providers of proactive and strategic IT services to small-medium organisations in New Zealand.



We have a collaborative international team where all tea
mbers gain exposure to and experience in emerging and innovative technology. 



We are committed to a futurist mindset, innovation and excellence and we have successfully catered to a broad spectrum of clients, ensuring that they leverage technology to their advantage – whilst minimising cybersecurity risks. As part of our growth, we are excited to strengthen our team with Senior Cloud Engineer / Senior IT Engineer.



As a Senior Cloud Engineer, you will be instrumental in designing solutions and providing technical support, guidance to help solve technical queries and issues.



This role involves operating an internal point of escalation for our established team of IT Engineers seeking input and advanced and complex technical issues. Your in-depth IT knowledge and skills will be key to guaranteeing the efficient resolution of detailed technical issues. This is a remote working from home (WFH) role, generally working local Philippines hours, however there may be work outside of these hours from time-to-time.



RESPONSIBILITIES:

1. Promptly diagnose, troubleshoot, & resolve technical issues related to hardware, software, network & other IT systems.

2. Oversee and maintain the performance, security, and consistency of company and client systems, servers & networks.

3. Construct & uphold comprehensive documentation on IT processes, system configurations, and solutions to issues.

4. Propose enhancements in systems, process workflows, methodologies & tools to ascertain optimal performance & experience.

5. Take the helm or be an active participant & leader in IT projects, encompassing a range of projects from system upgrades to new software/hardware installations & more. 

6. Guide junior support engineers & conduct training sessions for non-technical staff on IT best practices & contemporary tools.



We offer competitive salaries, including 13th month payments, health insurance and generous leave entitlements. We champion ongoing avenues for learning and professional development and being remote, this role allows working from home.



We’re looking for someone with approximately 5-10 years’ experience in IT Engineering roles, with at least 2 years in a senior or leadership position, that has the right attitude, is adaptable and enjoys solving technical problems. You will need to be proficient in configuring and managing a broad range of technologies that are relevant to smaller-midsize organisations such as Azure, Microsoft 365, Entra ID, Windows, Azure, Mac OS, Firewalls, Backup and Endpoint Protection. If you’re a self-starter, with a proven track record, we would love to hear from you.



PREFERRED TECHNICAL SKILLS

• Microsoft Azure

• Infrastructure as code (IAC)

• Microsoft 365 setup and administration

• Entra ID

• Automation expertise: Microsoft AI Foundry, PowerAutomate / Power Platform, PowerShell, Zapier, etc

• Cyber Security & Business Continuity

• Azure DevOps 

• Mobile Application Management, Mobile Device Management

• SQL Server

• PowerBI



SUPPORTING TECHNICAL SKILLS OF BENEFIT

• Firewalls, Routing, Switching, Fortinet/Fortigate, etc 

• Domain Administration and Websites experience

• Strong virtualisation experience

• Backup system experience

• Google Cloud Administration experience, AWS Cloud Administration experience

• VOIP and Phone system administration 



If you think you would be a good addition to our team, please send your Resume and Cover Letter to us.

title: Java Game Developer (libGDX)
description:
Job Description

Job Title: Java Game Developer (libGDX)

Job Type: Contract

Location: Remote

$: 50-150/hr



Job Summary:



Join our customer’s dynamic team as a Java Game Developer (libGDX), where you’ll bring engaging 2D and 3D cross-platform games to life. You'll leverage Java and the open-source libGDX framework to design, develop, and deploy high-performance games across desktop, Android, and web platforms, contributing to every stage of the game development lifecycle.



Key Responsibilities:



Design, develop, and maintain immersive 2D and 3D games using Java and libGDX for multiple platforms.

Collaborate closely with artists, designers, and other developers to define, prototype, and deliver new gameplay experiences.

Optimize game performance to ensure smooth, high-quality user experiences across desktop, Android, and web environments.

Build and maintain reusable, modular code architectures to accelerate future development and promote code sharing.

Implement innovative gameplay mechanics, user interfaces, and interactive features that engage and delight players.

Debug, troubleshoot, and resolve technical issues throughout the development process.

Communicate clearly and proactively with team members, providing thoughtful feedback and documentation.



Required Skills and Qualifications:



Proven experience with Java programming, especially in game development.

Extensive hands-on expertise with the libGDX framework.

Strong understanding of cross-platform game development concepts and challenges.

Demonstrated ability to optimize code for performance and efficiency.

Experience creating reusable, modular code structures in a collaborative environment.

Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with an emphasis on clear, organized documentation and teamwork.

Passion for crafting engaging, interactive gameplay experiences and a keen eye for detail.



Preferred Qualifications:



Experience working on both 2D and 3D game projects.

Familiarity with deploying games to web, Android, and desktop platforms using libGDX.

Background in performance profiling and advanced debugging for game applications.

description:
Job Title: Domestic violence - Psychologist (Ph.D/Psy.D)

Job Type: Contract

Location: Remote

$: 100 - 300/hr





Join our customer’s team as a Domestic Violence Psychologist (Ph.D/Psy.D), playing a critical role in advancing support services and interventions for those affected by domestic violence. Contribute your expertise in clinical psychology and trauma-informed care to generate impactful training data for AI solutions that will enhance future therapeutic and crisis response capabilities.



Key Responsibilities:



- Provide subject-matter expertise in domestic violence and trauma-informed care to support the training and evaluation of AI systems.

- Review and analyze clinical scenarios involving survivors of domestic violence to ensure psychological accuracy and sensitivity in AI training datasets.

- Contribute insights on risk assessment, safety planning, and crisis intervention to improve AI understanding of survivor support strategies.

- Evaluate AI-generated responses related to trauma and domestic violence, providing expert feedback to enhance empathy, accuracy, and ethical alignment.

- Collaborate with AI researchers and interdisciplinary teams to refine prompts, training materials, and model outputs.

- Translate clinical knowledge into structured training content and case examples for AI learning modules.

- Ensure AI outputs reflect trauma-informed principles, ethical standards, and survivor-centered practices.





Required Skills and Qualifications:



- Ph.D. or Psy.D. in Clinical Psychology or a closely related discipline.

- Licensed Psychologist with specialized experience in domestic violence cases.

- Demonstrated expertise in trauma-informed care and crisis intervention.

- Proficient in risk assessment and safety planning methodologies.

- Exceptional empathetic communication and active listening skills.

- Strong clinical documentation and analytical abilities.

- Commitment to ethical practice, confidentiality, and cultural sensitivity.

), and Instagram. The goal is to create engaging content that drives traffic and buyers to our live selling platforms on Whatnot and eBay Live.



Responsibilities:

The Virtual Assistant will be responsible for creating, scheduling, and managing social media content that promotes Mag Case Mafia’s inventory, live shows, and community engagement.



Key duties include:



• Create and schedule daily posts on
, X, and Instagram

• Promote upcoming Whatnot and eBay Live shows with engaging graphics and captions

• Post sports card highlights, deals, and featured inventory

• Design promotional graphics for live sales events

• Share clips, photos, and short-form content of cards and auctions

• Use trending hashtags within the sports card and collectibles community

• Respond to comments and messages to build engagement

• Track performance metrics and recommend improvements

• Maintain a consistent brand voice and style for Mag Case Mafia



Content Focus:

Content should be designed to convert viewers into buyers and followers into live-show attendees. This includes:



• “Card of the Day” posts

• Auction countdown posts for Whatnot and eBay Live

• Short video previews of cards going to auction

• Live show reminders and hype posts

• Deals, steals, and sports card market highlights

• Community engagement posts (polls, questions, etc.)



Goals:

The main objectives of this role are:



• Increase followers across
, X, and Instagram

• Drive traffic to Mag Case Mafia live shows

• Convert followers into active buyers on Whatnot and eBay Live

• Build brand recognition within the sports card community



Deliverables:



• Daily posting schedule (1–3 posts per platform)

• Weekly promotional campaign for live shows

• Monthly growth report including engagement and follower increases

• Branded graphics for live sale promotions



Ideal Candidate:



• Experience managing social media accounts for e-commerce or collectibles

• Familiarity with the sports card hobby and marketplace

• Experience promoting live selling platforms (Whatnot, eBay Live, etc.)

• Graphic design skills (Canva, Photoshop, etc.)

• Strong understanding of hashtags, trends, and engagement strategies



Compensation:

Open to hourly or monthly retainer depending on experience and results.



About Mag Case Mafia:

Mag Case Mafia specializes in sports card singles, graded cards, and collector-focused content. Our goal is to build a strong community of collectors while providing exciting live auctions and great deals on Whatnot and eBay Live.



We are looking for someone who can help grow our brand, increase engagement, and turn social media attention into real buyers

title: Senior People & Culture Lead
description:
About the Role

As a Senior People and Culture Lead you’ll be providing support and services to Buddle Operations throughout all aspects of the Client and Remote Professional life cycle. This includes support across staff onboarding and offboarding, RP relations, staff engagement and other admin functions.





Key Responsibilities

Strategic HR & Culture Leadership

- Develop and implement People & Culture strategy aligned with business growth goals

- Build and maintain a high-performance, accountability-driven culture

- Design and oversee career progression frameworks (tiers, salary progression, promotions)

- Lead staff engagement initiatives for remote teams

- Act as an internal advisor to leadership on people-related decisions



Talent Lifecycle Management

- Onboarding & Workforce Planning

- Develop onboarding frameworks for new hires

- Provide a welcoming environment to the new hire by inviting and facilitating pre-client orientation (covering company policies discussion and cybersecurity knowledge check).

- Manage compliant onboarding processes (contracts, documentation, benefits enrollment)



Offboarding

- Oversee full and proper staff offboarding process (which includes conducting exit interviews and equipment turnover procedures and the likes)

- Endorsing exiting/cancelled RP for re-profiling to Buddle Operations

- Issue the Master Contract Agreement, ICC, Quitclaims documents to existing staff, ensuring that documents are signed and agreed upon.

- Conducting System Sweep, Final Tech Check with all offboarded RP, help with reprofiling, final pay computation and  clearance



Performance Management

- Implement structured performance review cycles

- Design improvement plans and disciplinary procedures when required

- Provide coaching for major infractions and maintain proper documentation and coaching logs (WW and up)

- Manage escalations involving client dissatisfaction or staff conduct issues

- Support leaders in handling terminations in compliance with PH labor standards



Compensation & Benefits Administration

- Oversee payroll coordination and compensation structuring and ensure correct computation of:

- Overtime

- Holiday pay

- Deductibles

- Final pay

Assess potential implementation and administration of government-mandated contributions in the future:

- SSS

- PhilHealth

- Pag-IBIG

- Manage private Health Maintenance Organization (HMO) and benefits programs

- Checking compliance regarding submissions of pay invoices. 



Labor & Statutory Compliance

- Advise leadership on employment classifications (contractor vs employee models)

Oversee drafting and review of:

- Contractor contracts

- Statements of Work

- Addenda

- Disciplinary notices

- Ensure proper documentation for due process in disciplinary actions

- Stay updated on changes in Philippine tax and labor regulations



Policy Development & Governance

- Review existing and revise/draft new policies in the company handbook in a regular and timely manner.

- Ensure policies are aligned with both Philippine law and international client expectations

- Review, implement and create Business Continuity Procedures for all staff during emergencies or disruptions.



HR Systems & Reporting

- Oversee HRIS implementation and maintenance

- Maintain accurate staff data and compliance records

- Provide leadership with reports on:

- Headcount

- Attrition

- Engagement

- Compliance risks



Staff Engagement

- Spearhead company event and team engagement coordination

- Organise ongoing and create new engagement activities working with a set budget allocation per quarter



Other Responsibilities

- Make necessary process suggestions and improvements which can help the team

- Contributes to team effort by accomplishing related results as needed

- Perform other related tasks and duties that may be assigned later on



About You

- Minimum 3 years HR leadership experience in remote workforce or BPO/offshore staffing environment preferred

- You’re a quick learner and go where you need to go to get the job done. 

- Familiarity with various HR databases (BambooHR and Hubstaff is preferred)

- You have excellent communication skills, whether that be verbal or written, and know how to change your style of communication depending on your audience. 

- You have an understanding of people and how to create environments where they can be their best. 

- You have excellent organisation, project and time management skills 

- Ability to work autonomously and as a supportive team player - you can take a task and run with it but also look to contribute to the team (and celebrate the achievements!) 

- Ability to give and receive effective feedback with curiosity and respect

- Strong decision-making skills

- Excellent communication and interpersonal skills

- Strong analytical skills and the ability to adapt a measured approach in a fast-paced environment

- A strong commitment to continuous process improvement, initiatives and the ability to solve problems creatively



Key Competencies

- Strategic thinking

- Strong legal/compliance awareness

-Executive communication

- Emotional intelligence

- Process-building and systems orientation

- Commercial awareness (balancing staff advocacy and business sustainability)



Benefits Included

Health insurance

Internet allowance

KPI incentive program

Fortnightly virtual happy hour 

Annual group off-sites



Finer Details

Schedule: 7am - 4pm PHT, Mon - Fri

Start Date: TBD

title: Short-term Rental Guest Reservations Manager
description:
About the Role



As a Short-term Rental Guest Reservations Coordinator, you will play a key role in creating seamless and memorable guest experiences across our holiday accommodation portfolio. Serving as the first point of contact, you’ll represent the client’s brand values by delivering attentive, personalised, and proactive service at every stage of the guest journey. From managing inquiries and reservations to coordinating payments, maintenance, and guest communications, this role is central to ensuring guest satisfaction and operational excellence. If you are detail-driven, guest-focused, and thrive in a dynamic hospitality environment, this is an excellent opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our team.





Key Responsibilities



Provide prompt, courteous, and informative responses to guest inquiries via phone,
, software platforms, and in person.

Manage reservations efficiently, confirm details, process payments, and handle special requests while encouraging direct bookings.

Process guest payments and monitor upcoming bookings to ensure all reservations are fully paid before arrival.

Log and manage maintenance requests, liaising with internal staff, external contractors, owners, and guests to ensure timely resolution.

Act as the primary point of contact for guest issues and disputes, coordinating with cleaning and maintenance teams and managing post-stay damage claims through appropriate channels.

Communicate reservation changes with the cleaning department, particularly for last-minute bookings or altered check-in/check-out times.

Collect, log, and share guest feedback to support continuous improvement of guest experiences.

Follow the Triage Communication Procedure to ensure professional and effective communication with clients, staff, and stakeholders.

Support the team by completing ad-hoc tasks and responsibilities as required by management.



Other Responsibilities



Make necessary process suggestions and improvements which can help the team.

Contributes to team effort by accomplishing related results as needed.

Perform other related tasks and duties that may be assigned by the client later on.



About You



Minimum of 3 years’ experience in guest reservations, short-term rentals, property management, or a related hospitality role.

Guest-Focused: Warm, empathetic, and professional in all interactions, with a passion for delivering exceptional service.

Skilled Communicator: Strong interpersonal and communication skills across phone,
, software, and in-person channels.

Detail-Oriented: Accurate in managing reservations, payments, and service requests.

Problem-Solver: Proactive in resolving guest issues, finding fair solutions, and maintaining positive relationships.

Hospitality Experience: Previous experience in customer service or hospitality, demonstrating professionalism and commitment to guest satisfaction.

Tech-Savvy: Proficient with booking management platforms such as Airbnb, 
, and direct booking systems; experience with Guesty, Breezeway, Suite-Op, Google Suite, Notion, and Slack is highly regarded.

Flexible & Proactive: Willing to take on additional responsibilities, learn new skills, and grow with the company.

Preferred (Not Essential): Familiarity with bookkeeping and payroll.



Finer Details



Schedule: TBD

Start Date: TBD
