title: Overseas Cold Calling Specialist – Meeting Setter
description:
Role Overview



We are looking for a confident and resilient tea
mber who can make outbound cold calls to overseas prospects and help turn initial contact into the next business step, especially a video meeting.



This role is not about hard selling on the phone.

It is mainly about:



opening conversations,



identifying the right contact,



understanding whether there is real potential,



and securing the next step for our sales team.



Key Responsibilities



Make outbound cold calls to overseas prospects from company-provided lead lists.



Briefly introduce the company and the purpose of the call in a natural and professional way.



Identify whether the person reached is the relevant contact, and try to find the right decision-maker when needed.



Conduct initial qualification of potential opportunities through short phone conversations.



Secure the next step whenever possible, especially a video meeting or a follow-up call.



Record call outcomes clearly and hand qualified opportunities to the next-stage team.



Requirements



Clear spoken English and confidence in phone communication.



Comfortable making cold calls to people you have never spoken with before.



Emotionally steady when facing rejection, hang-ups, or short responses.



Quick thinker who can adapt naturally during live conversations.



Experience in cold calling, appointment setting, lead generation, sales development, or business outreach is a strong plus.



Strong action mindset and focus on outcomes, especially reaching the right person and setting meetings.



We care more about



confidence on the phone,



resilience under rejection,



ability to think in real time,



and ability to turn a cold call into a next step.

title: HIRING NOW: Content Editor/Writer plus Benefits, HMO, PTO etc.
description:
180 Marketing, a leading e-commerce SEO company, is currently looking for a Content Editor/Writer. This is a 100% work-from-home position that offers great pay and benefits.



Apply by filling out this form:

(Please note that AI-generated responses will be auto-rejected with no reply.)



Watch our 3-minute video with more information about 180 Marketing and the Content Editor position: 
/watch?v=qb7YuyuQFo4



ROLE: Content Editors are responsible for ensuring the written content is proofread, edited, and returned to the Project Managers within the allotted timeframe. You may also be called upon to write content on occasion, as necessary.



Responsibilities

- Proofread and edit blog content, product and category pages, press releases, and more

- Fact-check content

- Manage your own internal workflow of writing projects

- Assist with writing for time-sensitive assignments when necessary



Benefits

- P30,000 - P40,000, dependent on experience

- HMO after 6-month probationary period

- 10 days* of paid leave each year

- 10 days of paid public holidays each year

- Up to 10% end of year bonus payment

- Extensive Content Marketing training (paid to learn)



Requirements

- Excellent written and verbal English skills

- Minimum of 2 years of writing, proofreading, copyediting OR content editing experience

- Background in SEO, digital marketing, or e-commerce marketing is a plus

- Ability to understand and adhere to world-class writing and brand guidelines

- 3+ years of experience with Surfer SEO, on-page SEO strategies, multiple content marketing formats (detail your experience in your application)



About 180 Marketing



Based in USA, 180 Marketing is one of the leading SEO companies in the world. We have a talented team of experts who have cracked the code on Google's ranking factors, AI SEO and we consistently deliver outstanding results. As a result, our clients love us, and we have very high client retention with amazing testimonials and case studies.



We offer a great work environment, great salary with bonuses, extensive training and opportunities for growth.

title: MSP IT Support Technician
description:
We're a small MSP based in Boulder, Colorado. We serve clients across a range of industries who rely on us as their full IT department. Five people on the team. We believe in fast response times, thorough follow-through, and seeing every issue through to resolution.

We're looking for a Philippines-based technician who can handle a solid range of helpdesk tickets and pitch in on project work. A lot of our project work is non-customer-facing, which makes it a great fit for a remote tech. You'll be working directly with our US-based team during Mountain Time hours.

What you'll be doing



Resolving M365 issues: Exchange Online, Teams, SharePoint, OneDrive, Entra ID, licensing

Endpoint support through Intune, NinjaRMM, Immybot

User provisioning and offboarding

Networking troubleshooting and supporting line of business applications

Contributing to migration projects, Intune rollouts, and compliance buildouts

Keeping documentation current so the next person has everything they need



What we're looking for



3+ years at an MSP supporting multiple clients

Strong hands-on Microsoft 365 administration

Real Intune experience: enrollment, compliance policies, app deployment

Migration experience: tenant-to-tenant or SharePoint

Solid networking fundamentals and firewall experience

Excellent English, written and spoken

Someone who stays with a problem until it's solved



Nice to have

QuickBooks Enterprise. Familiarity with NinjaRMM, HaloPSA, Huntress, ImmyBot, CIPP, Hudu. Working toward MD-102 or SC-300. Familiarity and interest with AI tools and automation .



What we offer

Full-time remote. A team that communicates well and trusts you to manage your own work. Interesting work that goes beyond routine helpdesk. Certification support for MD-102 and SC-300. A stable role with a company that's growing.

title: Home Health Intake & Staffing Coordinator
description:
Position Summary



We are seeking a highly organized and service-oriented Virtual On-Call Support Specialist to provide remote administrative and coordination support  full time 8 hours a day Pacific Time (CA)

This role supports intake operations, scheduling follow-up, patient call management, customer service, care coordination assistance, QA support, and EMR documentation tasks.

The ideal candidate has prior healthcare experience, strong computer proficiency, excellent English communication skills (oral and written), and the ability to remain calm and professional during urgent situations.



Key Responsibilities



Intake & Administrative Support



• Assist with intake processing and referral coordination

• Upload and track physician orders in EMR

• Upload and monitor endorsement reports

• Ensure timely documentation processing and electronic filing

• Maintain organized and accurate digital records



Scheduling & Care Coordination



• Schedule and confirm follow-up visits

• Support communication between field clinicians and office staff

• Assist with care coordination activities

• Escalate urgent or clinical matters to appropriate leadership



Patient & Customer Service Support



• Answer and triage incoming patient and caregiver calls

• Provide professional, courteous, and compassionate customer service

• Accurately document all calls in EMR

• Route concerns appropriately and promptly



Quality Assurance (QA) Support



• Assist with documentation tracking and follow-up

• Support compliance monitoring processes

• Help ensure required documents are uploaded and complete

• Maintain organized electronic QA files



Qualifications & Requirements



Required



• Prior healthcare experience (home health, hospice, clinic, hospital, or medical office)

• Strong English language proficiency (oral and written)

• Excellent customer service skills

• Highly organized with strong attention to detail

• Strong computer skills and proficiency in Microsoft Office

• Ability to multitask and work independently

• Ability to work after-hours, evenings, and weekends (U.S. Pacific Time) when needed

• Reliable high-speed internet and professional work environment



Preferred



• Home Health experience preferred

• EMR experience preferred

• Medical background (RN, LVN, Medical Assistant, or allied health) preferred

• Clinical licensure preferred





How to Apply



• Please send a short cover letter highlighting your experience relevant to the role you are applying for, and include your answers to the questions below:

1. Please describe your healthcare experience in detail. Include the setting (home health, hospice, clinic, hospital, etc.), your role, how long you worked there, and the specific administrative or coordination tasks you handled.

2. How many years of experience do you have specifically in Home Health?

3. How many years of experience do you have within Home Health?

4. How many years of experience do you have scheduling Home Health clinicians?

5. What Home Health EMR systems have you used (e.g., Kinnser/WellSky, Homecare Homebase, Axxess, etc.)?

6. Describe your experience handling intake and patient calls in Home Health.

title: OPERATIONS & GROWTH MANAGER – PALAWAN (EL NIDO)
description:
OPERATIONS & GROWTH MANAGER – PALAWAN (EL NIDO)

(Chief of Staff / Operations Lead)



ABOUT THE COMPANY

We are a fast-growing travel and expedition company based in Palawan, Philippines, delivering unique island experiences and multi-day expeditions to international travelers.



As the company continues to grow, we are looking for someone who can help strengthen the organization, improve operations, and support the development of the company.



You will work directly with the founder and help ensure the company operates with strong standards, clear accountability, and efficient coordination across teams and locations.



THE ROLE

Growth creates opportunities — but it also creates complexity.



We are therefore looking for someone who can help bring structure, discipline, and continuous improvement to the organization as the company scales.



You will act as the founder’s operational partner, helping ensure that operations run smoothly, teams remain aligned, and internal standards are consistently respected.



This role combines operations management, team supervision, and organizational development.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

• Monitor daily operations and ensure strong execution across teams

• Detect operational problems, inefficiencies, or irregularities early

• Ensure operational information (tours, bookings, reporting) is complete and reliable

• Support team leaders and reinforce professional standards

• Help maintain accountability, discipline, and strong operational follow-up

• Identify opportunities to improve processes, organization, and efficiency

• Support recruitment, onboarding, and team development

• Strengthen internal communication and coordination between teams

• Contribute to the company’s growth and operational development



WHAT YOU BRING

• Experience in operations management, team leadership, or business coordination

• Strong organizational skills and high attention to detail

• Ability to follow up and ensure things get done properly

• Natural authority combined with fairness and good interpersonal skills

• Strong sense of responsibility and accountability

• Ability to improve systems, processes, and team organization

• An international mindset and high professional standards

• Strong written and spoken English



LOCATION & TRAVEL

The role is ideally based in El Nido, Palawan.



However, the position allows 7–10 days per month working remotely outside El Nido.



Regular travel should be expected between our main locations, including:

• El Nido

• Coron

• Puerto Princesa



APPLICATION CHECK



To confirm that you have carefully read this job description, please start your application with the words:



“Standards matter.”



Then answer the following question in 4–6 lines:

If you were responsible for supervising operations in a travel company, what types of dysfunctions or irregularities would you watch for?



Please also attach your CV to your application.



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



WHY YOU WILL LOVE THIS ROLE

• Work directly with the founder in a high-trust leadership role

• Play a key role in strengthening and improving a growing company

• Combine operations, leadership, and organizational development

• Contribute directly to the company’s growth

• Live and work in one of the most beautiful destinations in the world

title: Lead Transactions Coordinator & Executive Assistant
description:
I’m a real estate entrepreneur based in Dallas, Texas, running two connected businesses: a real estate sales team that helps buyers and sellers, and a property management company that operates furnished co-living rentals. We use ClickUp for task and project management and Google Drive as our primary file system. We also use Buildium as our main property management tool.



I’m looking for a full-time Real Estate Lead Transaction Coordinator to manage the flow of transactions from contract to close, making sure deadlines are met and nothing falls through the cracks.



This role combines transaction management with systems coordination. You’ll handle communication between agents, clients, title, and lenders — while also ensuring that files and documents for each transaction are organized and fully documented.



WHAT YOU’LL DO

- Manage all real estate transactions from contract to close

- Communicate with agents, clients, title companies, and lenders to ensure smooth closings

- Schedule showings, enter listings, and draft proposals

- Track deadlines, contingencies, and documentation compliance

- Create and update SOPs and workflow documentation for transaction processes

- Coordinate with automation partners for system improvements



YOU’D BE A GREAT FIT IF

- 2+ years of experience as a Real Estate Transaction Coordinator (or a similar role in real estate operations)

- You follow instructions exactly and don’t cut corners

- You write and speak clearly in English

- You stay calm managing many moving parts

- You take ownership and don’t need hand-holding

- You take initiative: you spot issues early, investigate, and propose next steps/solutions

- You use good judgment and can prioritize without being told every step

- You thrive in a fast-paced environment and can adapt quickly as priorities shift

- You are tech-savvy, detail-oriented, and reliable under deadlines

- Understanding of contract timelines, title/lender coordination, and client communication

- Flexibility to work some hours on weekends is preferred





ROLE DETAILS

- Full-time, remote

- Schedule: Mon–Fri, aligned with CST

- Pay: $5-7 USD/hour, based on experience

- Long-term role with growth and bonuses



HOW TO APPLY (READ CAREFULLY)

We do not review platfor
ssages.

Applications that don’t follow instructions are disqualified.



STEP 1 —

1. Send an
 to 

2. Subject line: Lead Transactions Coordinator – [Full Name]

3.
 body must include only:

- A short greeting

- A Google Drive folder link

- Your answer to the Detail Check (see Step 3)



STEP 2 — GOOGLE DRIVE FOLDER

1. Create a folder named: [Your Full Name] — Lead Transactions Coordinator Application

2. Set sharing to “Anyone with the link can view.”

3. You can organize the folder however you think is best. I will be looking at both what you submit and how you organize it.

4. Include the following:

a. Resume (PDF)

b. Tech and Setup

   - Include a screenshot of your internet speed showing download and upload speeds. 

   - Include a screenshot of your computer specs showing RAM, processor, and OS.

   - Include one photo of your current workspace (desk and computer).

c. Written Answers (one Google Doc)

   - Transactions Coordinator Experience

      - Describe one property management role or company you worked with. Include:

      - Number of properties/units

      - Your day-to-day responsibilities

      - Tools you used 

   - Taking Ownership

      - We already have SOPs and systems, but they’re still improving.

      - What would you focus on in your first 2 weeks to keep operations running smoothly without needing constant supervision?

d. Systems Proof (2–4 screenshots)

   - At least 1 “HQ” or home base view you’ve built (for a founder/team)

      Example: a dashboard, control panel, or main view in ClickUp, Asana, Notion, etc.

   - At least 1 project management board or folder structure you created

      Example: a tool for maintenance tracking, tenant or leasing pipeline, or vendor coordination

   - For each screenshot, add a short caption (this can be in a small Google Doc or directly on the image as text), including:

      - What the system is used for

      - Which tool it’s in (ClickUp, Asana, Google Drive, Notion, etc.)

      - What part you personally designed or organized

   - If you cannot share screenshots from a previous client because of confidentiality, you may recreate a similar structure in a fresh workspace (with fake data) and take screenshots of that instead.

e. Video Introduction (2–4 minutes)

STEP 3 — DETAIL CHECK

WHAT HAPPENS NEXT

-
 application screen

- Hire

title: QC VA Photo Editor
description:
QC & Final Photo Touch-Ups (Full Time, Long-Term) ****Please follow instructions carefully****



Overview

We’re hiring a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant with strong photo editing experience to ensure our real estate photos look perfect before delivery. You’ll be performing corrections and final touch-ups on photos already processed by an AI photo editor, AutoHDR.



This is a full time position and a long term employment opportunity with a fast growing media company. Schedule is Tuesday - Saturday from 2am-10am EST.



What You'll Do:

-Take photos processed by AutoHDR and import them to Lightroom

-Perform final touch-ups: straighten verticals, correct wall colors, remove objects, minor exposure/color tweaks

-Export final images

-Upload photos, floor plans, 3D tours, and videos to HDPhotoHub

-Ensure everything is organized and delivered on time



What You Need:

-Solid Lightroom & Photoshop skills

-Strong attention to detail in photo selection and visual quality

-Willing to follow detailed SOPs and take initiative when needed

-Reliable, proactive, and committed for long term employment

-Work schedule is Tuesday - Saturday from 2am - 10am EST

-Strong written English



Bonus Points For:

-Experience with HDPhotoHub, AutoHDR, Dropbox

-Real estate media experience



How to apply: 

****Please follow instructions carefully****



Please send your resume and a dropbox link to a video recording of you answering the following questions:

1) Tell us about yourself, what do you love?

2) Detail your past work experience and how it relates to this job at Win The Listings. Why you do you believe you would be a great candidate for this position?



Only applicants that follow those instructions will be considered.

title: Amazon Sourcer
description:
ONLINE ARBITRAGE

Looking to grow our team!Seeking one part time position who will undergo a trial period of one week paid before being brought on as part time.



We are more than an Amazon arbitrage (OA) business. If you seek a long term, advancing position, this is for you.



PSA

We have systems in place to ensure we don’t bring on any bad actors. If you plan on sending us leads that are being shared across other businesses or you are pulling items off of a leads list, you will be let go immediately.



We are seeking a part time product sourcer who can grow in our company and later be promoted to a higher paid managerial role. If you are not a hard worker and can’t prove it to us over our interview process, don’t even bother completing this application.



Job Responsibilities

Tasked with sourcing in-stock 3-6 leads a day.



Follow up, build and maintain SOPs.



Requirements

Keepa experience required

Seller Amp (SAS) experience

Online Arbitrage experience

Familiar with manual, reverse/storefront stalking, keepa product finder

Understanding ROI, margin and sales rank

Ability to work part time (20 hours per week)

Reliable internet Compensation & Benefits

Unlimited PTO

Holidays Off

Bonuses which will be discussed

Communication Skills



This should be simple, we're looking for people who don't need much supervision. Someone that is dependable and eager to work. We know this is a very competitive market and we are looking for a rockstar tea
mber we can rely on for years and years to come. We need someone who pays attention to detail and understands how to properly read data. We expect the majority of the items to be shared with our team to be purchasable and pass all of our SOP checks.  Loyalty is the most important thing to our team. We're looking for people who want to stay with us long term and can see themselves in management /senior roles. If you've read this far, congratulations as I've found out many don't. Please put your favorite fruit as the title of your application.

Furthermore, we will not be accepting any candidates who already work for another client as we need exclusivity. 
 will be required for team communications.



If you want your application expedited please send over 3 leads researched from the same day of your application.

Include Supplier Link & Amazon US link.

This is our criteria.

Low sales rank

Minimum 30% ROI

Keepa chart shows low odds of going below break even price



In addition please answer the following questions in your application submission.

Have you been previously employed to be an online arbitrage sourcer?

If so, why did you leave your current candidate?

How many monitors do you have?

Why should we choose you as one of our candidates?

What is your favorite sport and why ?  

Do you have a Seller Amp and Keepa subscription?



Thanks for taking the time out of your day to apply, best of luck!

Please be advised that a specific level of experience is mandatory. Only candidates who have prior experience as virtual assistants are encouraged to apply.

title: Sales Staff
description: The ideal candidate will handle online marketing, client inquiries, product presentations, and assist buyers throughout the sales process while ensuring excellent customer service.

title: Digital Ads Specialist (Google Ads) – Remote
description:
We are looking for a Digital Ads Specialist to manage and optimize online advertising campaigns for a U.S.-based law firm. The primary goal of this role is to generate high-quality client leads through Google advertising platforms.



The firm specializes in helping individuals navigate complex legal matters, including family law, guardianship, and criminal defense. This role plays a key part in attracting potential clients who need legal support through targeted digital advertising campaigns.



This is a full-time remote position for someone experienced in managing paid search campaigns and optimizing ad performance.



Responsibilities



• Create, manage, and optimize Google Search Ads campaigns

• Manage and optimize Google Local Service Ads (LSAs)

• Conduct keyword research to target high-intent searches

• Exclude low-quality or irrelevant search terms using negative keywords

• Adjust bids and targeting to maximize high-quality leads

• Focus campaigns on profitable and relevant case types

• Reduce low-value inquiries and irrelevant leads

• Monitor ad performance and continuously improve campaign results

• Test different ad copy and targeting strategies

• Adjust geographic targeting to prioritize ideal markets

• Improve conversion rates through landing page recommendations

• Track leads generated from advertising campaigns

• Provide monthly reports on campaign performance

• Monitor cost-per-lead and overall campaign effectiveness

• Identify opportunities to improve ROI



Requirements



• 2–5 years of experience in digital advertising or paid search campaigns

• Proven experience managing Google Ads campaigns

• Experience with Google Local Service Ads (LSAs)

• Strong understanding of keyword research and negative keyword strategies

• Ability to optimize campaigns to generate high-quality leads

• Experience analyzing campaign performance and improving results

• Comfortable using time tracking tools during work hours



Nice to Have



• Experience running ads for law firms or professional services

• Experience with conversion tracking tools

• Experience improving landing page performance

• Experience working with lead generation campaigns

• Experience with HubSpot or Clio Grow CRM

• Experience improving lead-to-client conversion funnels



Work From Home Requirements



To maintain a productive remote work setup, candidates must have:



Computer & Equipment

• Primary and backup computer (Intel i5 / Ryzen 5 minimum, 8GB RAM)

• Webcam for meetings

• Headset for clear communication



Internet Connection

• Primary connection: Minimum 30 Mbps download / 10 Mbps upload

• Backup connection: Minimum 10 Mbps download / 5 Mbps upload



Compensation & Benefits



• Full-time remote position

• Salary: PHP 30,000 – 40,000 per month

• Monthly allowance: PHP 5,000

• Paid leaves and healthcare benefits

• Long-term career opportunity with growth potential



Schedule:

Monday – Friday (Eastern Standard Time working hours)



How to Apply



If you are interested in this role, please submit your updated resume and a summary of your Google Ads experience.



Qualified applicants will be contacted for the next steps of the recruitment process.



 To confirm that you read the full job post, please include the word “star” at the beginning of your application and briefly describe a Google Ads campaign you managed.

title: B2B Affiliate Manager
description:
Company Overview: We are a high-growth credit consulting and funding readiness firm. 

We do not do manual, low-level credit repair. We leverage automated systems to fix credit so we can secure high-ticket business funding for our clients.

The Role: We are looking for a relentless, highly organized B2B Affiliate Manager. Your singular goal is to onboard, train, and manage financial affiliates who process credit denials daily. You will target mortgage brokers, loan officers, auto dealers, CPAs, and real estate agents.



 You are not selling our service to consumers; you are showing other businesses how to monetize their dead leads.





Core Responsibilities (The Scope of Work):

Outbound Prospecting: Identify and relentlessly contact local and national financial affiliates.



Pitching the ROI: Present our 10X ROI referral program, offering affiliates a finder's fee equal to roughly 10% of the customer's Lifetime Value (LTV) for every paid client they refer.



Script Training: Train every affiliate to use our mandatory 60-second elevator pitch at the exact 
nt of a loan denial. You will ensure they know how to communicate the timeframe, cost, and value proposition.



Portal Activation: Drive 100?option of our GoHighLevel affiliate portal. You must ensure affiliates know exactly how to submit leads into the portal to eliminate data entry friction.



Relationship Management: Act as the primary point of contact. You will follow up on lead submissions immediately, track commission payouts, and continuously re-engage affiliates to ensure they keep sending volume.



Requirements:

Fluent English (written and spoken). You will be speaking with US-based business owners and sales managers.

Experience in outbound B2B sales, recruiting, or partnership management.

Familiarity with CRM management (GoHighLevel preferred).

Ability to operate on US time zones and follow strict operational checklists without needing to be micro-managed.

title: Case Manager
description:
**Please do not apply if you don't have atleast 1 year of experience working in a US Law firm, and only applicants who follow instructions will be considered. **



We are a California-based Lemon Law Firm seeking a dedicated, detail-oriented Case Manager with at least 1 year of experience in Lemon Law/Civil Litigation case management. This is a full-time, remote position, and you must be available to work Monday–Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM Pacific Time.



We are looking for someone who is committed to a long-term position and does not have any other work commitments. If you're organized, reliable, and ready to grow with a stable legal team — we want to hear from you.



How to Apply:

Please submit a cover letter with your application that covers:



1. Your experience as a case manager.

2. How you stay on top of your caseload and remain organized.

3. Include a link to your resume and make sure it's accessible.



Note: Qualified applicants may be asked to complete a DISC assessment during the hiring process. This helps us understand your natural working style and how you best collaborate within a team.



Minimum Requirements:

1+ years of experience managing legal cases, ideally for California-based clients in Lemon Law/ Civil Litigation.



Two professional references from prior legal positions.



No other job commitments — this is a full-time, long-term role.



Key Responsibilities:

Conduct legal research and draft legal documents, including discovery.



Prepare and manage case files from intake through resolution.



Organize and maintain legal documents and case records.



Perform accurate data entry and maintain case tracking systems.



File and serve legal documents with the court.



Work closely with attorneys and support timely case progression.



Stay current with relevant legal regulations and updates.



Qualifications:

Strong legal writing and document drafting skills.



Excellent time management, organization, and attention to detail.



Proficiency in legal software (Filevine preferred).



Effective communication skills, both written and verbal.



Spanish fluency is a plus.



Work Environment:

Remote, full-time position — 9 AM to 6 PM Pacific Time, Monday through Friday.



Requires a quiet, professional workspace and reliable internet connection.



Must be self-motivated, responsible, and able to work independently.



Training provided, but strong self-management is essential.



We're looking for someone who is ready to commit, contribute, and grow with our team. If that sounds like you, submit your cover letter and resume today!

title: Google SEO & GMB Ranking (Google Expert)
description:
Job Title: Local SEO & Google Business Profile (GMB) Specialist  



Overview:  

Seeking an experienced Local SEO specialist to manage and optimize Google Business Profiles to increase rankings in local search and Google Maps. The role focuses on improving visibility, generating more calls and leads, and implementing proven local SEO strategies.



Responsibilities:  

- Optimize and manage Google Business Profiles  

- Improve rankings in Google Maps and local search results  

- Perform keyword research for local markets  

- Build and manage local citations and directory listings  

- Optimize business descriptions, services, and posts  

- Implement on-page local SEO improvements  

- Monitor rankings and report performance metrics  



Requirements:  

- Proven experience with Google Business Profile optimization  

- Strong understanding of Local SEO and citation building  

- Experience with tools such as Ahrefs, SEMrush, BrightLocal, or similar  

- Ability to show past results or case studies  

- Strong communication and reliability  



Preferred:  

- Experience working with marketing agencies  

- Knowledge of reputation management and review strategies

title: Appointment Setter/Cold Caller
description:
FULL-TIME APPOINTMENT SETTER / COLD CALLER



We are a new and growing agency that helps US small businesses get more customers with websites and Google review systems.

title: Ecommerce Static Ads Desginer
description:
We’re looking for a creative who understands what makes static ads perform.



Not just someone who can design — but someone who can think in concepts, angles, and scroll-stopping ideas.



We run an eCommerce brand in the card game space, and we’re looking for someone who can consistently come up with high-performing static ad creatives.



Your role will be simple:



We give you a basic idea, hook, or angle, and you turn it into a fully executed static ad concept.



This includes:

 • Visual concept

 • Layout

 • Messaging

 • Turning the idea into a scroll-stopping ad



You should understand what makes people stop scrolling and click.



What You’ll Be Doing

 • Turning simple ideas or angles into finished static ads

 • Creating high-performing ad creatives for paid social

 • Developing multiple variations of ad concepts

 • Thinking about hooks, curiosity, and psychology



What We’re Looking For



Someone who:

 • Has experience creating static ads for eCommerce brands

 • Understands direct response advertising

 • Knows how to create scroll-stopping visuals

 • Can think in concepts, not just design

 • Understands consumer psychology and hooks



This role is perfect for someone who enjoys turning ideas into ads that convert.



Requirements

 • Proven experience creating static ads for eCommerce

 • Portfolio showing ad creatives or paid social ads

 • Ability to take a rough idea and execute it creatively

 • Strong understanding of ad angles and messaging



Bonus if you have worked with:

 • Meta ads

 • DTC brands

 • Performance marketing teams



How to Apply



Please include:

 1. Examples of static ads you’ve created for eCommerce brands

 2. A short explanation of why you think those ads perform well



We’re looking for someone who can become a long-term creative partner as we scale our brand.

Bi-Rite Global is a certified small business and a trusted retailer that supplies a wide range of products to government agencies — including federal, state, and education sectors. Based in California, we are rapidly expanding and focused on delivering quality products, competitive pricing, and reliable service to our government partners.

We are looking for a Sales Development Representative (SDR) – High-Volume Cold Calling (B2G) that is responsible for initiating outbound calls to federal, state, and local government agencies to identify contracting opportunities, introduce company services, and qualify decision-makers involved in procurement. The role supports the business development pipeline by generating leads, setting capability briefings, and gathering intelligence on upcoming bids and purchasing needs.

 and phone to nurture relationships

# Remote MBBS Doctor – Dental Consultation Specialist



We are hiring a **local Filipino MBBS Doctor with specialization or experience in dentistry** to support a high-profile international dental company through **remote patient consultations and diagnostic evaluations**.



This role focuses on the **early-stage consultation and patient discovery process**, helping assess potential patients interested in treatments such as:



* Dental implants

* Invisalign

* Cosmetic dentistry

* Full-mouth restorations



You will work with patients **entirely online**, reviewing diagnostic reports, X-rays, and patient history to help determine treatment suitability.



---



# Core Responsibilities



## 1. Online Patient Consultations



* Conduct **remote consultations with prospective dental patients**

* Understand patient concerns and dental history

* Guide patients through possible treatment pathways

* Answer patient questions about procedures and outcomes



---



## 2. Patient Intake & Discovery



* Perform **initial patient intake assessments**

* Collect and review relevant medical and dental history

* Identify patient goals and treatment expectations

* Document findings clearly for the dental treatment team



---



## 3. Diagnostic Review



* Review **X-rays, scans, and diagnostic reports**

* Assess the patient's dental condition

* Identify potential dental issues that require treatment

* Evaluate suitability for procedures such as implants or Invisalign



---



## 4. Case Evaluation Support



* Assist the clinical team in evaluating potential cases

* Provide professional insights regarding dental diagnostics

* Flag cases requiring further evaluation by specialists



---



## 5. Patient Communication



* Clearly explain diagnostic findings

* Help patients understand treatment options

* Maintain a professional, reassuring consultation experience



---



# Required Qualifications



Applicants must meet the following requirements:



* **MBBS Doctor (Philippines)**

* Background, training, or specialization in **dentistry**

* Strong knowledge of **dental diagnostics**

* Ability to review **X-rays and diagnostic reports**

* Excellent English communication skills

* Comfortable conducting **online consultations**



---



# Preferred Experience



* Experience with **dental implants**

* Experience with **Invisalign**

* Experience in **cosmetic dentistry**

* Previous **telehealth or online consultation experience**

* Experience working with international patients



---



# Ideal Candidate



The ideal candidate:



* Has strong **diagnostic and analytical skills**

* Is comfortable communicating with patients online

* Can clearly explain medical findings and treatment options

* Is organized and detail-oriented

* Can work effectively in a **remote healthcare support role**



---



# Salary



?65,000 PHP per month

Full-time remote position



---



# How to Apply



All applicants **must complete both steps below**:



**Step 1 — Fill out our application form**





**Step 2 — Book a prescreening call**

30-minute call with our Chief of Staff





Applications that **do not complete both steps will not be considered**.



---



We are looking for a **qualified Filipino MBBS doctor with dental expertise who can support patient consultations and diagnostic reviews in a remote environment**.

title: Jewelry CAD Designer
description:
Job Title: Jewelry CAD Mentor – Rhino 3D CAD



Job Type: Contract / Short-Term Mentorship (2-3 hours per day a month)



Overview

We are seeking an experienced jewelry CAD designer to mentor a student learning professional jewelry design using Rhinoceros 3D. The goal of this mentorship is to develop a structured workflow for designing production-ready custom rings for a jewelry business.



The mentor will guide the student through industry-standard modeling practices used by professional jewelry CAD designers, focusing specifically on engagement rings, stone settings, and manufacturing-ready designs.



Primary Responsibilities



• Teach structured workflows for designing custom rings in Rhinoceros 3D

• Guide the student through real ring modeling exercises

• Provide corrections and feedback while the student performs the modeling

• Explain industry manufacturing tolerances and best practices

• Demonstrate efficient modeling strategies used in professional jewelry CAD

• Help develop repeatable workflows for common ring structures

• Review models for production readiness (casting and stone setting)



Training Focus Areas



Ring Foundations



Ring sizing workflow



Shank profiles (comfort fit, flat, cathedral, knife-edge)



Ring symmetry and construction



Stone Settings



4-prong and 6-prong settings



Basket and peg head settings



Stone seat geometry



Stone placement accuracy



Engagement Ring Structures



Solitaire rings



Halo engagement rings



Hidden halo designs



Three-stone rings



Pavé bands



Advanced Design Elements



Pavé stone layouts



Channel settings



Gallery rails



Structural supports



Manufacturing Knowledge



Casting tolerances



Minimum thickness for durability



Prong dimensions



Stone spacing ratios



Polish allowances



CAD Quality Control



Clean surface construction



Boolean modeling best practices



Avoiding non-manifold geometry



Preparing files for STL export and 3D printing



Teaching Method



Sessions will be conducted live via screen share.

The student will perform the modeling while the mentor provides instruction and corrections.



The mentor’s role is to guide the workflow rather than simply demonstrate modeling.



Preferred Qualifications



• 3+ years professional jewelry CAD experience

• Advanced experience using Rhinoceros 3D for jewelry design

title: Senior Risk & Compliance Consultant (Fintech & Crypto)
description:
We need an expert who bridges the gap between Web2 Traditional Finance (Fiat Rails) and Web3 On-chain Compliance.

Your core mission is not just to be a "blocker," but to "design safe mechanisms that enable business velocity." You will ensure we pass the rigorous onboarding requirements of our banking partners (e.g., Cybrid's AML program review) while managing the operational risks of a high-volume payment platform.



Key Responsibilities

Compliance Program Build-out

Draft BSA/AML Policies from Scratch: Create internal compliance policy documents (CIP, AML, OFAC) that meet US banking standards. This is a prerequisite for going live with partners like Cybrid.

Define KYC/KYB Standards: Design tiered identity verification workflows for our dual-track business (B2B Agency + B2C Palau ID). Define limits and requirements for Tier 1 vs. Tier 2 users.

Regulatory Strategy: Assess licensing requirements (MTL/MSB/MiCA) for US, Canada, and EU markets, providing a strategic roadmap for the next 12-24 months.

Operational Risk & Fraud Prevention

ACH Risk Management: specifically for ACH Pull scenarios. Design logic to mitigate NSF (Insufficient Funds) and Unauthorized Returns (e.g., balance checks via Plaid, settlement holding periods).

On-Chain Risk Integration: Configure on-chain analysis tools (e.g., GoPlus, Chainalysis, Elliptic) to define blocking rules for high-risk wallet addresses.

Transaction Monitoring: Set up velocity limits and alert rules for suspicious activities; handle Suspicious Activity Reports (SARs) if necessary.

Partner Enablement

Due Diligence (DD): Represent the company in handling compliance inquiries from upstream banking partners and infrastructure providers (Cybrid, Hex Trust), assisting in completing complex DD questionnaires.

Vendor Assessment: Evaluate the compliance robustness of new payment rails (e.g., European SEPA, Asian local payouts).



Requirements

Experience: 5+ years of risk/compliance experience in Fintech or Crypto Exchanges. Must have hands-on experience with US Banking Rails (ACH/Wire).

Expertise:

Deep knowledge of FinCEN, OFAC sanctions, and AML workflows.

Strong understanding of the "FBO Account" model and the legal boundaries of a "Money Transmitter."

Understanding of stablecoin (USDC) minting and burning flows.

Tool Stack: Familiarity with industry-standard tools like Persona (Identity), Plaid (Bank Auth), and Chainalysis/TRM Labs (Crypto AML).

Mindset: Ability to balance "Compliance Requirements" with "User Experience." We don't need a bureaucrat; we need a builder who offers solutions.



Bonus Points

Certified Anti-Money Laundering Specialist (CAMS) certification.

Experience helping startups successfully onboard with Zero Hash, Cybrid, Circle, or Stripe.

Knowledge of RNS.ID (Palau Digital Residency) or similar sovereign identity projects.

Familiarity with India TDS tax regulations or Philippines cross-border remittance laws.

title: SEO and Article Writer
description:
Job Overview



We are looking for a skilled SEO and Article Writer who can create high-quality, search-optimized content that drives organic traffic, improves rankings, and supports our product and marketing goals. This role combines strong writing skills with SEO best practices and close collaboration with the SEO team.



Key Responsibilities



Research, write, and publish original articles, blog posts, tutorials, and guides related to our platform (e.g., digital residency, blockchain, tech trends, and user guides).



Optimize content for SEO by applying target keywords, meta titles, meta descriptions, internal linking, and on-page best practices.



Collaborate closely with the SEO Specialist to align content with keyword strategies, traffic goals, and performance metrics.



Edit and proofread content to ensure clarity, accuracy, tone consistency, and grammatical correctness.



Develop and maintain content calendars aligned with product launches, updates, and marketing campaigns.



Create supporting content such as social media posts, newsletters, landing page copy, and whitepapers as needed.



Track and analyze content performance using analytics tools and improve content based on data-driven insights.



Stay updated on industry trends, including web3, blockchain, AI, and digital platforms, to produce relevant and timely content.



Required Skills & Experience



Proven experience as a content writer, article writer, blogger, copywriter, or SEO writer (portfolio of published work required).



Strong writing and storytelling skills with the ability to produce clear, engaging, and error-free content.



Solid understanding of SEO fundamentals, including keyword research, on-page optimization, content structure, and search intent.



Experience using SEO tools such as Google Analytics, Google Search Console, Ahrefs, SEMrush, Moz, or Screaming Frog.



Ability to research complex or technical topics and simplify them for a general audience.



Strong analytical mindset with experience interpreting performance data and generating actionable insights.



Excellent communication skills and ability to collaborate with cross-functional teams.



Strong time management skills and ability to meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.



Familiarity with content and productivity tools such as Google Docs, WordPress, Grammarly, or similar platforms.



Nice-to-Have Qualifications



Experience writing for industries such as blockchain, web3, crypto, SaaS, or tech startups.



Familiarity with CMS platforms like WordPress or Webflow, and basic HTML/CSS knowledge.



Knowledge of advanced SEO concepts such as technical SEO, international SEO, EEAT optimization, voice search, or AI-driven content optimization.



Experience using SEO tools for content optimization and reporting.



Background in journalism, marketing, or technical writing.



SEO-related certifications (e.g., Google Analytics, SEMrush SEO Toolkit).



Multilingual abilities or experience writing for international audiences.

title: Marketing Manager
description:
Job Overview:

We are seeking a creative and results-driven Marketing Manager to lead marketing initiatives and drive brand growth. The ideal candidate will develop and execute strategic marketing plans across digital and traditional channels, manage campaigns from ideation to execution, and analyze performance to optimize results. You will collaborate closely with Sales, Product, and Creative teams to ensure brand consistency and maximize outreach.



Primary Responsibilities:



Develop and implement comprehensive marketing strategies to increase brand awareness, drive customer acquisition, and support sales goals.



Plan and manage multi-channel marketing campaigns, including digital (SEO, SEM, social media,
) and offline (events, partnerships, print).



Conduct market research to identify customer trends, competitive landscape, and opportunities for growth.



Oversee content creation for websites, blogs, newsletters, social media, and advertising campaigns.



Manage and optimize digital marketing tools and platforms (CRM, marketing automation, analytics).



Set KPIs, track campaign performance, and prepare regular reports on ROI, engagement, and other key metrics.



Work closely with internal teams and external agencies/vendors to execute projects on time and within budget.



Lead and mentor a team of marketing professionals (optional, if managing a team).



Ensure brand consistency across all channels and touchpoints.



Requirements:



Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Communications, or related field (Master’s degree is a plus).



3–7 years of experience in marketing, preferably in [industry if needed: tech, consumer goods, B2B, etc.].



Proven experience designing and executing successful marketing campaigns.



Strong knowledge of digital marketing, SEO/SEM, analytics tools (Google Analytics, HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.).



Excellent communication, project management, and organizational skills.



Creative thinking and strong analytical skills.



Ability to work independently and as part of a cross-functional team.

Certification in Digital Marketing, Google Ads, or Analytics.



Experience managing budgets and external agencies.



Familiarity with graphic design tools (e.g., Canva, Adobe Creative Suite) is a plus.

title: Accounting Specialist (Contractor)
description:
Location: Remote (U.S.-Based Company)

Engagement Type: Independent Contractor



Position Overview

We are a U.S.-based media company seeking an experienced and highly organized Accounting

Specialist to support our finance operations. This contractor role is responsible for managing

accounts payable and receivable, maintaining accurate vendor and client records, and ensuring

sound accounting practices.



The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, comfortable working independently, and highly proficient

in QuickBooks Online and Excel/Google Sheets. This role plays a critical part in maintaining

accurate financial records, reconciling accounts, and supporting financial reporting processes.



Key Responsibilities

Accounts Receivable

? - Invoice clients accurately and in a timely manner

? - Monitor and match incoming payments

? - Research and resolve billing discrepancies

? - Communicate with clients regarding account status, charges, and outstanding balances

? - Send weekly collection notices for overdue accounts

? - Distribute monthly client statements



Accounts Payable

? - Review and verify invoices and statements

? - Determine proper account coding and accurately record transactions in the accounting system

? - Post accounts payable transactions to the general ledger

? - Maintain and manage the vendor master file

? - Process vendor payments (check, credit card, ACH/electronic transfer)

? - Communicate with vendors to resolve discrepancies and ensure timely payment processing



General Accounting Support

? - Prepare and adjust journal entries

? - Verify and post weekly credit card transactions

? - Reconcile accounts and identify discrepancies

? - Assist with monthly and year-end close activities

? - Support financial reporting and audit preparation

? - Participate in ongoing professional development to stay current with accounting standards and industry trends



Required Qualifications

? - Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field (or equivalent experience)

? - 2–5 years of accounting or finance experience

? - Experience with U.S.-based accounting practices

? - Solid understanding of GAAP principles

? - Proficiency in QuickBooks Online

? - Strong working knowledge of Microsoft Excel and/or Google Sheets

? - Experience using various payment platforms

? - Excellent organizational skills and attention to detail

? - Strong communication and problem-solving abilities

? - Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities



Preferred hours

Availability to align with US Mountain Standard Time

title: Technical & On-Page SEO Specialist
description:
Role Overview

We are looking for a highly analytical and client-facing Technical SEO Specialist with a minimum of 4 years of experience. You will be the technical backbone of our SEO strategy, responsible for diagnosing complex crawl issues, leading high-stakes domain migrations, and masterminding on-page optimization strategies. This role requires a unique blend of "under-the-hood" technical prowess and an editorial eye for content performance.



This is not a "back-office" role. You will be expected to lead client meetings, explain complex crawl data in plain English, and act as a consultant to international stakeholders. The ideal candidate has a "detective" mindset for technical issues and a "teacher" mindset when presenting to clients.



Key Responsibilities

_Deep Crawl & Infrastructure Analysis: Perform exhaustive audits to identify patterns in crawl budget waste, rendering bottlenecks, and IA flaws.

_Strategic On-Page Optimization: Beyond basic meta tags, you will develop sophisticated on-page strategies including semantic keyword clustering, internal linking architecture, and content gap analysis to improve topical authority.

_Domain & Site Migrations: Lead the full lifecycle of complex migrations. You’ll ensure that not only do the URLs redirect correctly, but that the on-page content and metadata are preserved or improved during the transition.

_Performance Storytelling: Present findings directly to clients. You must be able to explain how a technical fix (like Core Web Vitals) combined with an on-page fix (like NLP-driven content updates) creates a winning ROI.

_Content-Technical Liaison: Work with content teams to ensure new assets are optimized for both users and search engines from day one (
 markup, header hierarchy, and image optimization).



Required Experience & Skills

_4+ Years Experience: Proven track record in a technical/on-page SEO role, ideally in an agency or enterprise environment.

_Migration Veteran: Experience managing large-scale domain migrations with zero loss in organic equity.

_Search Intent Mastery: A deep understanding of how to map keywords to the buyer’s journey and optimize content for Featured Snippets and "People Also Ask" boxes.

_The "Dev" Language: Strong understanding of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, and how they interact with on-page elements.

_Data Manipulator: Expert-level ability to use Excel/Google Sheets to merge crawl data with keyword performance data.

_Enterprise / Commercial Websites: Deep understanding of large scale websites and impact of SEO to e-commerce.

_Exceptional English Communication: You must possess advanced verbal and written English skills. You are comfortable leading live presentations and handling "on-the-spot" technical questions from clients with confidence.

_Proven Client-Facing Background: Experience managing client expectations, defending strategies, and reporting on KPIs directly to business owners or CMOs.



Technical Stack

_The ideal candidate must be a power user of:

_Project Management: Jira, Asana, Monday, Plaky or any other similar tools.

_Crawlers: Screaming Frog (Expert), or Lumar.

_Analytics & Performance: Google Search Console, GA4, and Lighthouse and pagespeed insights.

_SEO Platforms: Semrush or related / similar platforms

_Diagnostic Tools: Screaming Frog Log File Analyser, Chrome DevTools.

title: Google Workspace Systems Specialist
description:
Google Workspace Systems Specialist

APPLY: 



NOTE: This position is advertised on other platforms



Location: Americas/Asia Pacific

Salary Range: AUD: 54-70k

Full time, 40 hours /week, rostered

Work from Anywhere

Elevate your career with this mission-critical role! You’ll go far beyond the basics of administration. you’ll become the architect of our digital ecosystem, mastering advanced administration and security while venturing far beyond basic troubleshooting.



Are you the Google Workspace Systems Specialist we are looking for?



Are you an experienced Google Workspace administrator who loves solving complex technical problems and building secure, elegant systems for businesses?



Do you enjoy turning chaotic tech stacks into clean, secure, automated environments?



If you’re passionate about cloud infrastructure, security, and helping business owners escape “Tech Hell”, you might just be the person we’re looking for.



SixFive helps small businesses regain control of their technology so they can focus on what they do best. For more than 20 years we’ve been implementing secure, cloud-based systems that support business growth using Google Workspace, WordPress, GoHighLevel and modern automation tools.



We are a Tier One Google Partner of more than 14 years, and we specialise in helping business owners protect their intellectual property, improve their security posture, and simplify their technology stack.



We’re growing and we need a Google Workspace Systems Specialist to join our team.



About You



The ideal person for this role is someone who thrives on solving technical challenges, building secure systems, and helping businesses use technology properly.



You’re the kind of person who notices the misconfigured DNS record before anyone else does, and you enjoy fixing it properly.



You care about security, reliability, and doing things the right way.



You might be the person we’re looking for if:



You are smart, fast and confident with cloud systems.

You have deep experience administering Google Workspace environments.

You are extremely organised and detail-oriented.

You communicate complex technical concepts in plain English that business owners understand.

You take absolute ownership of the systems you build and manage.

You love solving problems and finding more efficient ways to automate work.

You document your work so thoroughly that someone else could maintain the system tomorrow.

You are proactive and identify potential issues before the client even notices them.

You enjoy teaching others and helping tea
mbers grow their technical knowledge.

You are comfortable working fully remotely and collaborating online with tools like Google Workspace.

You are a fast learner who actively uses AI tools to work smarter and improve your workflows.

You are motivated by building systems that are secure, reliable, and scalable.



Thinking this sounds like you? Read on.



About the Role



The Google Workspace Systems Specialist reports directly to the Managing Director and acts as the internal technical lead for Google Workspace systems and migrations.



You’ll work closely with our Level 1 support team, providing escalation support and guiding technical decisions.



You will also work directly with clients to ensure their systems are secure, efficient, and fully adopted.



This is a fully remote, full-time role, and we are ideally looking for someone based in the Asia Pacific time zone with some overlap with Sydney, Australia working hours.



In this role you will:



Design and manage secure Google Workspace environments including Shared Drives, permissions and data retention policies.

Execute flawless data migrations from Microsoft 365, Dropbox, IMAP servers and other platforms into Google Workspace.

Manage
 authentication and deliverability including DMARC, SPF and DKIM alignment.

Use command line tools such as GAM and other automation tools to manage environments at scale.

Monitor client environments for security risks and anomalies.

Conduct monthly technical account reviews with clients to ensure systems remain secure and well adopted.

Implement AI-assisted workflows and automation to improve internal efficiency and client systems.

Provide technical escalation support to Level 1 support staff and help them grow their knowledge.

Document all systems, migrations and configurations to a “done done” standard in our internal knowledge base.



Core Skills & Experience



To succeed in this role you must have strong hands-on technical experience with Google Workspace and related infrastructure.



Essential skills include:



Expert-level Google Workspace administration (Google Workspace Administrator certification preferred).

Strong knowledge of
 authentication (DMARC, SPF, DKIM).

Deep understanding of DNS and internet infrastructure (MX, TXT, CNAME, TTL, nameservers).

Experience executing data migrations from platforms like Microsoft 365, Dropbox and IMAP servers.

Experience with command line tools and automation such as GAM, Bash or similar.

Knowledge of cybersecurity best practices and frameworks (such as NIST awareness).

Understanding of device management across Mac, Android and Chromebook environments.



Experience using AI/LLM tools to accelerate technical work, documentation and analysis.



What You'll Get when you join SixFive



We believe great people do their best work when they are trusted, supported and given the freedom to build great systems.



Here’s what you’ll get when you join SixFive:



Work on meaningful problems

You’ll be helping business owners protect their intellectual property, improve their security posture and escape “Tech Hell”.



A remote-first environment

Work from anywhere with a team that values clarity, autonomy and results.



Ownership and autonomy

You will have real responsibility for the systems you design and manage.



A culture of learning and improvement

We invest heavily in tools, automation and AI to help our team work smarter.



A team that values plain English and real results

We focus on solving real business problems, not hiding behind jargon.



Employment Type



Embrace the remote work life!



This full-time role (40 hours per week) offers the flexibility to work from home where ever you are situated in the world.



How to Apply



Apply Now! 



include the passphrase “Bazinga!” so we know you’ve read the full job description.



We look forward to meeting you.



If you know someone who would be a great fit for this role, please share this opportunity with them.



Thank you for helping us find the right person to join our team.

title: Backend Developer (Node.js / Firebase) – Part-Time / Full-Time | Remote
description:
We are seeking a Backend Developer to support and enhance our existing applications running in a Node.js and Firebase environment on Google Cloud Platform (GCP). In this role, you will help maintain live systems, introduce new functionality, and ensure the backend infrastructure continues to operate efficiently and securely.



This opportunity is well suited for someone comfortable working with production systems and capable of making sound technical decisions when improving backend architecture.



Key Responsibilities:

- Maintain and enhance backend services supporting live applications

- Develop and improve backend functionality using Node.js and Firebase

- Build and maintain RESTful APIs, cloud functions, and serverless components

- Evaluate system architecture and propose improvements when needed

- Monitor and improve system stability, performance, and security

- Handle deployments and maintain CI/CD pipelines and version control processes

- Work with the outgoing developer to ensure a smooth project transition

- Deliver ongoing updates, feature enhancements, and production support



Required Qualifications;

- 5+ years of backend development experience

- 3+ years of hands-on experience with Node.js and Firebase

- Experience deploying and managing applications on Google Cloud Platform

- Demonstrated experience building and maintaining REST APIs and serverless backend systems

- Experience managing production environments with a focus on performance, security, and reliability (Firebase Auth, IAM roles, HTTPS, JWT)

- Familiarity with Git-based version control systems such as GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket

- Experience implementing and maintaining CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or Cloud Build)

- Strong analytical thinking and ability to independently recommend technical improvements

- Clear English communication skills, especially when explaining technical approaches



Preferred Experience:

- Experience working with Firebase Cloud Functions or GCP Cloud Functions in serverless environments

- Familiarity with additional GCP services such as Cloud Run, Pub/Sub, or Cloud Storage

- Experience working with financial or fintech applications involving secure systems and transaction processing

- Familiarity with monitoring and logging tools such as Firebase Analytics or GCP Logging/Monitoring

- Experience implementing secure authentication and authorization methods including OAuth or JWT

- Exposure to Terraform or similar infrastructure-as-code tools

- Experience managing staging and production environments and release processes

- Familiarity with API documentation tools such as Swagger or OpenAPI

- Experience guiding backend direction or mentoring developers during project transitions



Work Schedule:

- Part-Time (Approximately 20 hours per week)

- Full-Time (Available)

Flexible working hours between 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Philippine Time

title: Amazon Product Sourcing Analyst (Private Label Expansion)
description:
???? Amazon Product Sourcing Analyst (Private Label Growth)

We are a growing Amazon private label business building a portfolio of high-quality, profitable products.

We are not looking for a typical VA.

We are looking for a sharp, analytical thinker who can identify real product opportunities — not just copy what already exists.

If your approach to product research is browsing Alibaba or sending trending items, this role is not for you.

???? What This Role Actually Requires

Your job is to find products we can realistically launch and win with.

That means:

Understanding demand vs competition

Identifying weaknesses in existing listings

Seeing opportunities others miss

Thinking in terms of differentiation, not imitation

You will be expected to justify your ideas with clear, logical reasoning — not guesses.

???? Responsibilities

Identify high-potential product opportunities (non-saturated, scalable)

Analyze Amazon search results, listings, and customer reviews

Find gaps in the market (quality issues, missing features, poor branding, etc.)

Propose clear differentiation strategies

Suggest bundles, variations, or positioning angles

Evaluate pricing, competition, and demand

???? Daily Output Expectations

You will submit 3–5 product ideas per day.

Each idea must include:

Product name + Amazon links to competitors

Estimated selling price

Why demand exists

Why the competition is beatable

A clear and realistic differentiation angle

Optional: sourcing or cost insights

Low-quality or random ideas will not be accepted.

???? Requirements

You must:

Have real experience with Amazon FBA product research

Be familiar with tools such as Helium 10, Jungle Scout, etc.

Write clearly in English

Think critically and explain your reasoning

You should understand:

What makes a market saturated vs opportunity

Basic Amazon economics (fees, margins, pricing)

How to evaluate listings and reviews for weaknesses

? Do Not Apply If

You rely on “trending product” lists

You send random Alibaba links without analysis

You cannot explain your reasoning clearly

You have never done real Amazon product research

???? Compensation

$4–$6/hour to start

2–4 hours per day (part-time)

Performance-based bonuses will be given for product ideas we actually launch.

Top performers will quickly earn more responsibility and higher pay.

???? Required Test Task (Mandatory)

To be considered:

Start your application with the word: Growth

Then complete the following:

Find 3 product ideas in the kitchen or home category that:

Sell between $20–$50

Have consistent demand

Are not oversaturated

For each idea, include:

Amazon links

Why this is a strong opportunity

How we would differentiate and win

Applications without this will be ignored.

???? Opportunity

We are actively expanding and plan to launch many new products.

This role can grow into:

Product lead

Launch manager

Long-term strategic role

title: Youtube Video Editor
description:
Job Description:

We are looking for a talented and detail-oriented video editor to help create high-quality, engaging videos. The ideal candidate should have experience working with raw footage from phone recordings and be able to enhance content through expert editing, seamless transitions, and creative additions.



What You'll Do:

1. Tailored Workflow & Enhanced Quality: Optimize raw footage with noise reduction, audio leveling, and effects to elevate overall content quality.

2. Precise Editing & Efficiency: Edit and enhance videos while ensuring quick turnaround times without compromising quality.

3. Professional Video Editing: Deliver precise and creative edits to match the project’s needs.

4. Post-Production: Provide comprehensive post-production services to ensure polished, professional results.

5. Color Correction: Apply color grading and correction to enhance the visual appeal of videos.

6. Sound Design: Add background music, improve audio quality, and create an immersive audio experience.

7. Creative Storytelling: Make decisions on where to insert B-rolls, animations, zoom transitions, and graphics to make videos more engaging.

8. Subtitles & Captions: Add subtitles for accessibility and engagement.

9. Organizing Clips & Footage: Structure videos from beginning to end with a seamless flow.

10. Transitions & Video Effects: Implement smooth transitions and effects for a professional touch.

11. Intro & Outro: Create engaging intros and outros to enhance brand identity.

12. Multiple Revisions: Open to feedback and revisions to achieve the desired final product.



Ideal Candidate:



- Experienced in editing phone-recorded content

- Creative and detail-oriented

- Understands sound design and background music selection

- Proficient in color grading and correction

- Skilled in using professional video editing software (Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, Final Cut Pro, etc.)

- Efficient and deadline-driven



If you're passionate about video editing and can transform raw footage into engaging, high-quality content, we'd love to hear from you!



To apply, please send:

1. Examples of past video editing work

2. Are you willing to sign an NDA before getting the materials to edit?

3. Your typical turnaround time for a 3-5 minute video

4. Are you willing to create a short sample? We will provide raw footage for the test.

title: Lead Motion Graphic Designer/art director
description:
NOTE: please read every word very carefully and only respond until you have read everything in detail and understand it.



WANTED: motion graphics designer who can design well and lead my project and oversee four existing motion graphics designers on my team who are available part time to create one cohesive project of 16 high end videos that range from 60 seconds to 10 minutes each. You would need to be able to not only design your own videos but also to give them feedback, directions, and corrections as an art director. 



AVAILABILITY: MUST NOT HAVE A FULL-TIME JOB. Must be strictly freelance and fully available to work full-time for the next month or two. (My previous MG designer worked full-time for another company and burnt out. I do not want the new candidate I hire to burn out.)



PAY: $14hr at 40 hours a week = $560 x 4 weeks =$2,240 - month. One month guaranteed. Then week by week after that with the expectation the job will take two months. Willing to work week by week until the project is completed and the client is happy.



SKILLS: fluent in Adobe After Effects, fluent in Figma, Adobe firefly knowledge and beta is a plus, able to manage a team, years of experience with: video editing, motion graphics with text and images, and talking heads training videos



REQUIREMENTS: 

- experience working with Americans (must be able to take constructive feedback and matter of fact comments- keep business business... it's not personal) 

- experience overseeing a team of at least 4 motion graphics designers 

- experience executing projects with high quality and meeting deadlines

- able to communicate well and speak English well and understand English well

- able to follow directions.

- detail oriented/able to double check and triple check your own and their work before you show it to me.

- be able to meet with me via video chat, communicate with me via Slack and WhatsApp, during my time zone hours of 9am-5pm Pacific standard time

- able to meet (anywhere from once a day to once a week depending on how things are going with the project) with my team of four motion graphics designers in the Philippines during normal Filipino hours.



START DATE: AS SOON AS POSSIBLE. Today or tomorrow! 



NOTE: 

- please DO NOT respond to this job listing if you do not qualify with the information above.

- this is a very high-end client so unfortunately, you have to sign an NDA and you will not be able to post or share this work, but you will be able to tell people which client you worked for through my company and I will give them a good reference about you if you do a good job for me.

- if you do a good job and the project is successful, I will give you another chance for the next project I get with this big client

- if you normally do not work for $14 an hour and you prove yourself to me from this job, I will be willing to pay you more on the next job. If you normally work for more and this is a big step down I'm looking for a quality so I will be willing to give you a bonus that we can negotiate the amount on if you do perform well.



REQUIREMENTS TO APPLY: 

- you must qualify and agree to everything above

- you must send me your video portfolio links so I can view your work to make sure you are qualified

- be specific as to what videos you designed and what videos you only did motion for

- please send me at least five videos



HIRING PROCESS:

- I am guaranteeing at least one month of work and then week by week after that (if you perform well)

-I have the power to cancel our agreement at any time if you do not perform or meet my requirements.

- I will review your portfolio and d
 if I want to interview you with a video Zoo
eting. I will want to interview you between 8 AM and 1 PM Pacific standard time.



ONBOARDING PROCESS: 

- if you are hired, I will have you sign my NDA, fill out a W8-BEN document for tax purposes, connect you to Slack, the assets for the job via Dropbox, Figma, and have a tea
eting so you can meet everybody and you will get started immediately. I will be available for any questions via video chat or WhatsApp during my Pacific standard
  waking hours.

title: Appointment Setter (Remote)
description:

Opportunity for additional hours or full-time work for the right candidate.

title: WordPress Developer (Fullstack): $7 to $9 per hour
description:
We are a web design and digital marketing company in the US. We are looking for Full-Stack WordPress Developers with over 5+ years of experience to join our growing team of freelancers and help us build, customize, and integrate features that enhance our websites, platform performance, and capabilities. This position may lead to a full-time role.

Job Responsibilities:

+ Develop and create custom WordPress plugins from scratch based on specific project needs.

+ Customize existing plugins to extend functionality and tailor solutions.

+ Work with WordPress themes to modify and customize design and layout elements, ensuring responsiveness and user-friendliness.

+ Manage other freelance developers to complete website development projects.

+ Collaborate with the design, marketing, and backend teams to ensure seamless integration of new features and updates.

Key Qualifications:

+ Expertise in plugin and theme development and customization.

+ Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently or as part of a team.

+ Attention to detail, ensuring high-quality code and user experience.

+ Basic Knowledge of SEO best practices is a plus.



PLEASE READ THIS CAREFULLY:

Please Do Not submit your application unless and until you read and follow all of these instructions. This is Your First Test to see if you can understand and follow directions. You will Not be considered for this position if you do not follow all of these instructions.

Also, when you first send us your message, you MUST state at the beginning, such as "My favorite site is WordPress Native" Do not put this in the subject line. Please put it at the beginning of your message to us.



IMPORTANT: In your message, please provide a short paragraph explaining why you're the best candidate for this position. And provide your company website for review.



Do NOT contact us directly. Until we permit you, all communications will go through OnlineJobs.ph



YOU MUST FOLLOW ALL OF THESE INSTRUCTIONS PRECISELY. WE ARE LOOKING TO SEE IF YOU CAN FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS.
