title: SEO Operations Manager
description:
About Us



Athens Marketing (
) is a fast-growing SEO and lead generation agency based in Dallas, TX. We build and rank websites that generate real leads for real businesses.



This is not a corporate gig. We move fast, build things that rank, and care about results over process.



The Role



I need a right-hand operator who can own execution across multiple projects. You will not be taking tickets from a project manager. You will be the project manager.



You will work directly with me and manage the day-to-day operations of our web properties, content production, and SEO infrastructure. This role has real ownership and real responsibility.



I need someone who can think for themselves. You will not always have a playbook. Sometimes I will hand you a goal and expect you to figure out the path. If you need to be told every step, this is not the right role for you.



What You Will Do



Coordinate and QA content production across multiple websites and niches.

Handle on-page SEO, technical audits, and site optimization across our portfolio.

Manage Google Business Profile listings, citations, and local SEO tasks.

Build and QA pages on our Lovable/Vercel stack (React-based, no heavy coding required but you need to be comfortable navigating it).

Run client reporting and keep projects on schedule without me having to follow up.

Implement, test, and track new SEO strategies. When something isn’t working, figure out why and come to me with a solution, not just the problem.

Eventually manage other employees and contractors as we scale.



Requirements



3+ years working at an SEO agency or in-house SEO team. Not negotiable.

You know Ahrefs, Google Search Console, Google Business Profile, and Keyword tracking tools inside and out.

You have a deep understanding of link building.

You can write a coherent content brief and know what a well-optimized page looks like.

You have managed multiple projects at the same time without dropping balls.

You communicate clearly and proactively. If something is broken or behind, you tell me before I have to ask.

You are comfortable working independently with minimal supervision.



Bonus (Not Required)



Experience with React, Vercel, or modern web development tools.

Familiarity with Cloudflare, DNS management, or CDN configuration.

Experience building or managing a PBN.

Background in lead generation or pay-per-call marketing.



Compensation



$2,000/month USD, paid monthly. Full-time (40 hours/week).



Bonuses and raises based on performance.



How to Apply



Send me a message with the following:



1. A brief overview of your SEO experience (keep it to a few sentences, not a novel).

2. The name of an SEO tool you use daily and one thing most people get wrong when using it.

3. A link to your LinkedIn or portfolio if you have one.



No cover letter templates. No generic applications.

title: Sales Representative
description:
Job Overview



Work Setup: Remote (Work From Home)



As a Sales Representative, you will be responsible for identifying new business opportunities, conducting consultative meetings with prospective clients, and converting leads into customers.

You will engage with potential clients, understand their business needs, present Callease AI as a solution, and guide them through the sales process.



What You'll Do

Manage inbound leads and enquiries received through the company website,
, phone, or other channels.

Conduct consultative meetings with prospective clients to understand their needs and present suitable solutions using Callease AI.

Perform outbound sales activities including cold calls, warm outreach, follow-up calls, and personalised prospecting.

Approach potential clients in a professional and compliant manner, following relevant data protection, consent, telemarketing, and anti-spam regulations.

Build strong relationships with prospects and guide them through the sales process.

Maintain accurate records of sales activities, leads, and client interactions within the company CRM system.

Collaborate with internal teams when necessary to support the sales process or address client enquiries.



What We’re Looking For

Strong English communication and presentation skills.

Previous experience in sales, lead generation, or business development is preferred.

Ability to conduct consultative sales discussions and understand client needs.

Comfortable performing outbound sales activities including cold outreach.

Strong organisational and relationship-building skills.

Ability to work independently in a remote environment.



What You’ll Need (System Requirements):

Laptop or desktop computer

Stable high-speed internet connection

Backup internet connection

Noise-cancelling headset

Reliable power source or backup electricity











Perks

Opportunity to earn performance-based commission for successfully closing and managing client accounts.

Employee referral programme with rewards for referring successful candidates who join the company.

Fully remote work setup, allowing you to work comfortably from your home.

Be part of a growing technology company building innovative AI solutions for businesses across Australia.

Gain exposure to AI-driven products and international clients across multiple industries.



Do Not Apply If

You are currently working full-time elsewhere and cannot fully commit to this role.

You are not comfortable speaking with potential clients and conducting sales conversations.

You are not comfortable performing outbound outreach such as cold calls, follow-ups, or prospecting activities.

You are not confident presenting solutions and discussing business needs with potential clients.

You do not have a reliable laptop or desktop computer and stable high-speed internet connection.

You are not comfortable working remotely from a quiet and professional workspace.

You prefer a role without targets or sales responsibilities.

We are looking for someone who has excellent customer support skills, and who is motivated to grow within an international consulting environment.



About Kotech Solutions

Kotech Solutions is an Australia-based technology company that develops AI-powered products designed to solve real-world business challenges. Our solutions help businesses automate communication, improve customer engagement, and streamline operations using advanced AI technology.



One of our flagship products, Callease AI, is an intelligent AI calling platform that manages inbound and outbound calls, qualifies leads, schedules appointments, and supports business communication automatically.

Our clients are primarily based in Australia across industries such as real estate, mortgage services, automotive, and other service-based businesses.



We are currently looking for a Sales Representative based in the Philippines to join our remote team and support clients using Callease AI.

title: FULLTIME Question Curator for Instagram (Remote| PH-based VA)
description:

Salary, benefits, and growth:

*Performance-based raises

*We have tea
mbers who started at this level and now earn $1,000 per month after a couple of years

title: OPERATIONS COORDINATOR
description:
Help Build a Scalable, Soul-Led Business That Changes Lives Through Storytelling



We are not just running a business. We are helping women reclaim their voice, write powerful books, and step into their identity as authors, leaders, and change-makers.



And now, we are ready to expand.



About The Role



We are looking for a highly organised, proactive, systems-minded Operations Coordinator to become the operational backbone of The Book Doula.



This is not a basic admin role.



This is for someone who:

-sees inefficiencies and fixes them

-creates structure where there is chaos

-ensures everything runs smoothly behind the scenes



You will be responsible for ensuring the business operates with:

-clarity

-efficiency

-consistency

-and high standards



You will also play a key role in holding systems, processes, and team execution to a high standard, ensuring nothing falls through the cracks.



What You’ll Be Responsible For



1. Task & Workflow Ownership (Asana)



Own and manage all workflows across three key areas:



- Marketing / Growth

- Fulfilment

- Operations



Ensure every task includes:

- clear objective and purpose

- definition of done

- estimated time to complete

- assigned owner

- clear approval responsibility + a deadline



2. Maintain, create and organise:

- SOPs (written and video)

- structured, easy-to-follow workflows



3. Time Tracking & Resource Management

- Ensure all tasks are time tracked accurately

- Monitor estimated vs actual time

- Identify inefficiencies and optimise team workload

- You ensure time and resources are used effectively across the business.



4. Daily & Weekly Operational Oversight

- Monitor daily task execution across the team

- Ensure priorities are clear and work is progressing

- Follow up on overdue or blocked tasks

- Run a weekly workflow review to assess task completion, identify bottlenecks, adjust priorities and resourcing



5. Issue Identification & Resolution

- Identify operational issues early

- Escalate critical issues to the CEO quickly and clearly

 

For repeated issues:

-identify root cause

- propose and implement solutions

- track whether the issue is resolved



You do not just manage problems. You solve them at the source.



Performance Standards & Success Measures



Success in this role looks like:

1. All recurring tasks in Asana are clearly documented with objective, definition of done, estimated time, and instructions

2. The team completes work on time with minimal confusion or rework

3. Time tracking is consistently maintained and resourcing issues are identified early

4. Operational issues are escalated quickly and repeated problems are resolved at the root

5. Core product, launch, onboarding, fulfilment, and customer journey processes are fully documented and continuously improved

6. Training needs are identified early and the team is supported to improve performance



Team Coordination

- Lead and coordinate a small remote team of VAs

- Ensure clear communication, accountability, and smooth task handovers

- Identify gaps in performance, training, or process



Who This Is Perfect For



You are someone who:

- Loves systems, structure, and optimisation

- Notices patterns and inefficiencies quickly

- Communicates clearly and confidently

- Takes ownership and follows through

- Works efficiently and takes pride in high-quality execution

- Is reliable, trustworthy, and solutions-focused



You must have strong experience using Asana or similar project management tools.



What You’ll Love



- Working in a purpose-driven, soul-led business

- Being trusted to take ownership of operations

- Leading and organising a small high-performing team

- Creating real impact behind the scenes

- Supporting a growing, creative, and high-impact brand



Details

Remote role

Part-time

Flexible hours (with some overlap with Australian business hours preferred)



How to Apply (Important - instructions that are NOT followed will result in your application being instantly rejected so follow carefully :) 



- Please include a short Loom video (or Google Drive link) answering the following:

1) Why you are interested in this role

2) What you believe is critical for success in this role

3) Your experience managing systems or operations

4) An example of a process you improved

5) Your favourite life quote and why

6) Your availability and hourly rate

s to customers after onboarding meetings

title: Healthcare Enrollment Specialist
description:
1bios is a U.S.-based healthcare company providing Remote Patient Monitoring (RPM), Chronic Care Management (CCM), and other virtual care programs to physician practices across the United States.



We are seeking experienced, patient-focused Enrollment Specialists based in the Philippines to join our remote team. In this role, you will speak with U.S.-based Medicare patients by phone, explain physician-recommended healthcare programs, answer questions, and enroll patients who choose to participate.



This role is ideal for individuals with prior experience supporting U.S. healthcare organizations, Medicare Advantage plans, medical offices, or insurance call centers.



Position Overview

- Remote (Philippines-based)

- Independent Contractor role

- Full-time or part-time available (minimum 20 hours per week)

- Consistent schedule aligned with U.S. Eastern or Central Time business hours



What You’ll Do

- Make 8–15 outbound calls per hour to U.S. Medicare patients

- Educate patients on doctor-recommended RPM and CCM programs

- Answer Medicare-related questions (coverage, monthly participation, opt-out)

- Obtain verbal consent and enroll interested patients in our system

- Accurately document call notes and patient information

- Meet daily productivity and enrollment performance targets



Who You Are

- Experienced supporting U.S. healthcare or Medicare populations

- Comfortable speaking with senior or elderly patients

- Able to explain healthcare and Medicare concepts clearly and patiently

- A clear, neutral, and easily understandable English communicator

- Professional phone presence with strong pacing and pronunciation

- Comfortable making outbound calls for most of your shift

- Tech-savvy and experienced with web-based systems

- Reliable, self-motivated, and able to work independently



Communication Requirement



- Because this role involves speaking with U.S.-based senior patients, clear and easily understandable spoken English is essential.

- As part of the application process, candidates will be asked to submit a short voice recording (60–90 seconds) reading a provided script so we can assess clarity, tone, and pacing.



Compensation

- $5 per hour base pay

- $1–$2 per completed enrollment 

- Paid training provided

- Compensation is performance-driven. Consistent performers can increase earnings through enrollment volume and efficiency.



Requirements

- Prior experience working with U.S. healthcare or Medicare patients (medical office, call center, insurance verification, care coordination, etc.)

- Strong spoken English skills; must be easily understood by older adult patients

- Reliable high-speed internet (minimum 25 Mbps download recommended)

- Quiet, professional home office setup

- Headset with clear microphone

- Ability to work U.S. Eastern or Central Time hours

- Comfortable with consistent outbound calling

title: Freight Sales Representative
description:
Our U.S.-based freight brokerage. The primary responsibility of this role is to identify, develop, and manage shipper relationships to generate freight opportunities for our brokerage.

The ideal candidate has strong sales, negotiation, and communication skills, understands the U.S. freight and logistics industry, and can work efficiently during U.S. business hours.

 

Key Responsibilities



• Identify and prospect new U.S.-based shippers through cold calling,
 outreach, LinkedIn, and lead generation tools.

• Build and maintain a pipeline of potential shipping customers.

• Develop long-term relationships with shippers to secure consistent freight opportunities.

• Manage and grow existing shipper accounts.

• Provide excellent customer service and communication with clients.

• Coordinate with internal dispatch and operations teams to ensure shipments are moved successfully.

• Address and resolve customer concerns promptly.

• Maintain accurate records of sales activities, calls, and prospects.

• Track performance metrics including calls made, loads secured, and revenue generated.

• Provide regular updates to management on sales progress and opportunities.

 

Qualifications

• Previous experience in freight brokerage, logistics sales, or dispatching preferred.

• Experience selling U.S. transportation services is highly preferred.

• Strong English communication skills (spoken and written).

• Ability to work U.S. time zones.

• Proven ability to perform cold calls and sales outreach.

• Strong negotiation and relationship-building skills.

• Self-motivated with the ability to work independently in a remote environment.

 

Technical Requirements

• Reliable high-speed internet connection.

• CRM systems

• Transportation Management Systems (TMS)

 and communication tools (Microsoft Teams, Zoom, etc.)

 

Preferred Skills

• Background in B2B sales, logistics, and customer service.

 

Compensation

• Performance-based commission

• Opportunity for long-term growth within a growing U.S. freight brokerage.

 

Why Join Us

• Work remotely with a growing U.S. logistics company.

• Performance-based earning potential.

• Supportive team environment

title: Sales Dev Rep - Full Time (Base + Uncapped Commission)
description:

This isn’t a "volume-only" sweatshop role. We value quality over quantity. You will be targeting high-value decision-makers and setting appointments that lead to five-figure contracts.



What’s In It For You?

• Strong Base Pay: We believe in paying pros what they are worth.

• Highly Incentivized: Aggressive commission structure for every qualified meeting set and every closed deal.

• Niche Market: You are selling a solution that GCs need for safety and dust compliance—it’s a problem-solver, not a luxury.

• Warm Leads: We provide the lists and the CRM; you provide the charm and the closing skills.

• Career Development: The successful candidate will grow in this position to become an account executive and lead all project sourcing activities in a full-time salary role with benefits and bonus structure.

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

• Outbound Prospecting: Conduct targeted cold calls to General Contractors, Project Managers, and Facility Directors.

• Lead Qualification: Identify upcoming renovation projects in ConstructConnect and Hubspot and determine if our modular systems are a fit.

• Appointment Setting: Schedule high-quality walkthroughs or discovery calls for our sales engineers.

• CRM Management: Keep our pipeline clean and updated in Excel and Hubspot.

• Follow-up: Be the "persistent professional" who stays on a lead's radar without being a nuisance.

________________________________________

The Ideal Candidate

• Construction Industry Fluency: You know what a "GC" is, you understand the pressure of construction timelines, and you aren't intimidated by the industry.

• Exceptional English: Native-level fluency with a neutral or professional accent is required.

• The "Hunter" Mentality: You don't get discouraged by "No." You see it as a data point on the way to a "Yes."

• Tech Savvy: Comfortable with VOIP software, CRM tools, and LinkedIn Research.

________________________________________

How to Apply

1. Tell us about your most successful cold calling campaign.

2. Do you have experience in construction or other relevant industry?

3. Please respond to job description with the keyword “cold” in the title and add the word “cold” to the title of your resume.

4. Important: Please attach a 30-60 second voice recording or a link to a video of you introducing yourself. We want to hear your phone presence!

title: B2B Software Sales Closer Needed
description:
I have a growing pipeline of warm, qualified small-business leads for my cloud-based software solutions; what I need now is a proven closer who can turn that interest into signed agreements.



You will step in after the initial discovery call, guide prospects through the final demo or proposal review, handle objections confidently, and secure the e-signature. Because closing sales is the core focus, lead generation and lengthy nurturing sequences are already handled elsewhere in the team.



The role is fully remote, phone- and Zoom-centric, and you’ll log every touchpoint in our CRM (HubSpot). Success will be measured purely on deals closed and revenue booked, with commissions paid immediately once contracts are countersigned.



If you have a track record of B2B phone selling, especially for SaaS aimed at small businesses, let’s talk about how many deals you can help me bring across the finish line this quarter.

title: media buyer
description:
Job Title

Growth Marketer / Media Buyer (Meta + YouTube Ads) – Real Estate Lending Platform



About Us

We are a direct private real estate lender that funds investment properties across the United States.

Unlike most lenders, we have built our own technology platform and marketing system designed to attract and convert investors looking for financing.

Our platform already includes:

• Fix & Flip Profit Calculator?• DSCR Loan Calculator?• Rental Property Cash Flow Calculator?• Construction Deal Calculator?• Borrower deal submission portal?• Broker / affiliate partner portal?• Deal analysis tools for investors

These tools help attract real estate investors actively analyzing deals, which creates a powerful funnel for generating financing opportunities.

Your job will be to scale traffic and leads into this system.



Why This Role Is Different

Most marketing roles are just running ads to a landing page.

Our system is different.

We have already built:

• multiple real estate investment calculators?• deal analysis tools investors use before buying properties?• automated portals for submitting deals?• affiliate and broker systems for partners who bring us borrowers

This creates multiple ways to generate deals, not just direct ads.

The right marketer will be able to scale traffic into this ecosystem and grow the platform.



Compensation

Base compensation:



$750.00/month for the first 90 days

$850.00/month after successful onboarding



Additional incentives:



Bonus per qualified loan submission

Bonus per funded loan

Yearly bonuses based on growth goals



Current ad spend:



$3,000 – $4000 per month



As results improve, both budget and compensation will increase.



Hours

Expected workload:



35–40 hours per week



You can split your time between:

• campaign management?• ad creative testing?• funnel improvements?• reporting and optimization

This is intended to function as a dedicated long-term role, not a quick freelance project.



 Creative Development

A key part of this role is creating and testing ad creatives.

You must be able to develop your own advertising creatives, not just manage campaigns.

This includes:

• writing ad copy?• creating ad concepts?• producing image or video ads?• testing different hooks and messaging?• improving creatives based on performance data

You should be comfortable creating simple but effective ad creatives using tools such as:

• Canva?• CapCut?• basic video editing tools?• AI creative tools

The goal is to rapidly test multiple creatives each week to find winning ads and scale them.

We are looking for someone who can both:



launch campaigns

AND

create the ads that make them successful



You should be able to produce new ad creative variations regularly and continuously improve them based on results.





Lead Generation Goals

This role focuses on generating two types of leads.

1. Borrower Leads (Real Estate Investors)

These are investors looking for financing for deals such as:

• Fix & Flip?• Rental property loans (DSCR)?• New construction

These investors use our platform tools and submit deals through our portal.



2. Broker / Affiliate Partners

A large part of our growth strategy is recruiting partners who bring us deals.

Examples include:

• loan brokers?• real estate agents?• wholesalers?• property managers?• contractors and builders?• investor groups

These partners use our affiliate / broker portal to submit deals and earn commissions.

This channel can generate significant deal volume over time.



Marketing Budget Strategy

Advertising will typically be split approximately:



50% borrower lead generation

50% broker / affiliate recruitment



You will help test and optimize both channels.



Responsibilities

Paid Advertising

Manage campaigns on:



Meta Ads 
 & Instagram)

YouTube Ads

Google Ads (optional but helpful)



Tasks include:

• launching campaigns?• testing audiences?• scaling winning ads?• shutting down poor performers



Creative Testing

Continuously test:



Ad creatives

Ad messaging

Lead forms

Landing page angles



Goal: lower cost per lead and increase deal submissions.



Funnel Optimization

Work with our platform to improve:



Traffic into our calculators

Lead conversion rates

Deal submission funnels

Partner recruitment flows



You will also suggest improvements for:

• landing pages?• ad copy?• calls to action



Reporting

Track and report metrics such as:



Cost per lead

Cost per deal submission

Conversion rates

Campaign performance



Provide weekly updates.



Required Experience

Applicants should have experience with:



Meta Ads lead generation

Paid acquisition campaigns

Creative testing

Conversion optimization

Performance marketing



Experience in these industries is a strong plus:



Real estate

Mortgage

Solar

Insurance

Home services



These industries operate similar lead funnels.



Communication Requirements

Applicants must:

• speak clear English?• be comfortable communicating on weekly calls?• provide regular updates

Accents are fine — clarity and professionalism matter most.



Ideal Candidate

We are looking for someone who is:



Highly dedicated

Analytical

Self-driven

Interested in building something long term



The right person will care about making the system work and scaling the platform.



What Success Looks Like

Success in this role means:



Consistent borrower lead generation

New broker / affiliate partners joining

Increasing deal submissions

Lower cost per lead over time

Scaling ad spend profitably



If results are strong, the role can grow into:



Head of Growth

Marketing Director



with significantly higher compensation.



To Apply

Please include:

1. Examples of ad campaigns you managed

2. Platforms you specialize in (Meta, YouTube, Google)

3. Results you achieved (CPL, ROAS, etc.)

4. Why you are interested in this role

We are looking for one dedicated marketer who wants to grow with the company long-term.

title: Part-Time Acquisition Manager (Wholesale Closer + Comps) – Remote (Wed/Thu, $5hr, $20 bonues, commission)
description:
Company: Citrus Lane Rentals

Work Type: Part-time, remote



Schedule

 • Starting schedule: Wednesdays and Thursdays

 • Hours: 2 hours per day (4 hours/week)

 • Calling US sellers (must be comfortable speaking on the phone)

 • Additional hours may be added after a probationary review



Pay

 • $5/hour base

 • $20 per signed contract

 • Commission: % of the assignment fee (paid on closed/collected deals)



Job Overview



We are looking for a closing-focused Acquisition Manager to call motivated seller leads, run comps, present offers, negotiate, and get purchase contracts signed for our real estate wholesaling business.



What You Will Do

 • Call warm/hot seller leads and follow up consistently

 • Qualify sellers: motivation, timeline, condition, price

 • Run property comps (market value) to support offer pricing

 • Present offers clearly and professionally

 • Negotiate and handle objections

 • Get purchase contracts signed (DocuSign or similar)

 • Update notes and lead statuses in our tracking system

 • Coordinate handoff after signing (next steps with the team)



Required Skills

 • Strong English (spoken + written)

 • Confident on the phone (sales/closing experience)

 • Must know how to comp properties (sold comps, adjust for beds/baths/sqft, condition, days on market)

 • Able to use tools like Redfin/Zillow/Realtor (PropStream or similar is a plus)

 • Reliable and consistent every Wed/Thu

 • Organized follow-ups and clean notes

 • Stable internet, headset, quiet workspace



Preferred (Nice to Have)

 • Real estate wholesaling acquisitions experience

 • Experience calling US-based sellers



How to Apply (Required)



Send your application by
 to: Vladimir Ignacio (Operations Manager)

v.ignacio at citruslanerentals dot com



Include ALL of the following:

 1. Your experience (2–5 sentences)

 2. Your time zone + confirmation you can work Wed/Thu consistently

 3. Your equipment (internet speed + headset)

 4. Voice sample link (preferred)

 5. Comp Test (Required):

Comp this property: 15812 Starlite St, Clermont, FL 34714

Include:



 • Your step-by-step comp process (5–8 bullets)

 • At least 3 SOLD comps (0.5–1 mile if possible, similar beds/baths/sqft, sold within 6–12 months)

 • For each comp: address, sold price, sold date, beds/baths, sqft, link/source

 • Your final value range + best number, and 2–5 sentences why



 6. Objection question: How do you respond when a seller says “Your offer is too low”?



Applications missing any required items will not be considered.

title: Customer Service Representative (Voice & Non-Voice) - Remote Opportunity!
description:
Are you a customer service superstar with a knack for seamless communication across multiple channels? Do you thrive in a fast-paced, remote environment while putting the customer first?



Join our dynamic team as a Customer Service Representative and become the vital link between our company and our valued customers! We are looking for a highly skilled professional with experience in both voice and non-voice support.



Key Responsibilities

- Multichannel Support: Deliver exceptional service via phone,
, and live chat.

- Issue Resolution: Handle all customer inquiries, complaints, and support requests with professionalism and empathy, ensuring efficient and positive resolution.

- Process Management: Accurately process orders, refunds, and account-related requests.

- Documentation: Maintain clear, concise, and accurate records of all customer interactions using CRM tools.

- Collaboration: Work closely with internal teams to escalate and successfully resolve complex issues.

- Process Improvement: Actively contribute to improving customer support processes and FAQs.

- Performance Driven: Meet and exceed key performance indicators (KPIs) such as Customer Satisfaction (CSAT), First Contact Resolution (FCR), and response time.



What We're Looking For (Minimum Qualifications)

- Communication: Exceptional written and verbal English communication skills—clear, articulate, and grammatically proficient.

- Tech Savvy: Proficient in using CRM systems (e.g., Shopify, Gorgias, Zendesk, or similar tools). Basic troubleshooting skills for common customer concerns is a plus.

- Integrity: Absolute commitment to handling confidential information with the utmost discretion.

 your application to:

title: Finance Executive
description:
Reimagine access. Reimagine ownership. Build the future with Cinch.

 

Cinch is Southeast Asia's leading circular tech subscription company, redefining how people and businesses access technology. Instead of adding to the growing e-waste crisis, we enable affordable, sustainable access to devices through subscriptions that maximize reuse and extend their lifecycle.

 

We operate across B2C, B2B, and B2B2C channels, including major partnerships with global leaders like Samsung. Our model sits at the intersection of powerful mega trends—sustainability, embedded finance, and the shift from ownership to access—creating a massive opportunity to reshape the future of tech consumption.

 

At Cinch, we are builders with high standards, a bias for action, and a shared mission to create a generational company that outlasts us. Freshly funded by leading institutional investors and growing rapidly, we're creating an environment where ambitious people can do the best work of their careers—and where the work has real, lasting impact.



About the Role

Cinch is a fintech company operating across Singapore and Malaysia, with expansion into new markets underway. We're looking for a Finance Executive based in the Philippines to join our regional hub. You'll work closely with regional finance team to handle day-to-day finance operations across entities.





Core Responsibilities

Accounts Payable: Process and manage supplier payments across entities, ensuring accuracy and adherence to credit terms. Prepare weekly AP settlement schedules. Coordinate with procurement on PO matching and invoice registration in accounting system.

Collections & Receivables: Follow up on outstanding payments and verifying customer payments in coordination with Collections and Customer Experience teams. Escalate unidentified payments for resolution. Record and reconcile payments in accounting system against bank statements.

Bank & Payment Reconciliation: Prepare payment gateway reconciliation and ensure transactions are accurately recorded. Perform regular bank reconciliation and investigate discrepancies.

Revenue & Financial Reporting: Support the month-end closing process to ensure close activities are completed accurately and within required timelines. Prepare supporting schedules and documentation for monthly financial reporting. Record recurring journal entries and accruals as required.

Month-End Support: Assist with month-end closing activities to maintain timely acc target. Prepare supporting schedules and documentation.

Others: Document finance processes and contribute to building standard operating procedures (SOPs) for the regional finance function. Identify opportunities to improve efficiency and accuracy in finance operations. Actively participate in cross-departmental automation and system integration initiatives. Provide support on ad hoc finance tasks and projects as required by supervisor.



Growth Opportunity

As Cinch expands into the Philippines market, this role may evolve to support the setup of local finance and accounting infrastructure, including assisting with regulatory compliance, tax filings, and coordination with local service providers. Opportunity to be the founding finance team member for our Philippines entity.



Required Qualifications:

a degree in Accounting, Finance, or equivalent

Prior experience in a Big 4 accounting firm is highly preferred: 2-4 years of experience in a finance/accounting operations role (AP, AR, reconciliations)

hands-on experience with cloud accounting software (Xero and Netsuite are strongly preferred)

strong Excel skills (reconciliations, data manipulation, pivot tables)

Knowledge of IFRS or SFRS accounting frameworks

Comfortable working remotely across time zones with Singapore-based team

detail-oriented with strong follow-through on transactional volume

fluent in English (written and verbal).



Preferred Qualifications:

Prior experience in a Big 4 accounting firm is highly preferred or, experience working in a startup, fintech, or other high-growth environment

Familiarity with Philippine tax regulations, BIR compliance, and statutory filings.

title: Sales Representative
description:
Join a fast-growing US online home goods retailer and enjoy the learning and opportunities that you have while working with us.



We strive to provide 5-star service & shopping assistance to all of our clients, and all of our team is accountable to fulfill this.



We are looking for a Sales Representative who can assist prospective buyers and close online ecommerce sales.



We're only looking for full-time, long-term, ongoing cooperation.



Work schedules available:

8 AM to 4 PM US EST

4 PM to 12 AM US EST



Your work week will be 5 days per week, with 2 days off per week. Days off will be selected with your manager. We will try to accommodate your preferences for which days you like, based on availability.



This role starts ASAP!!



Job Duties and Responsibilities:

Receive incoming phone calls and live chats from potential customers (prospects) who indicated that they need shopping assistance. This does not include calls and chats from existing customers that need help with their orders (that’s a job for a different department)

Makes follow-up calls, writes follow-up
s, and text messages to potential buyers. We try to follow up 5x with each person that contacted us (unless they indicate that they are no longer interested). We don’t do cold calling. Only reaching out to prospects who interacted with our online store and left their contact information.

After each interaction with a prospect/customer, writes notes & comments in our CRM (Asana)

Communicate efficiently and build rapport with potential customers

Assists prospects in their shopping journey and helps make the purchase decision

Ensures that all prospects’ questions and objections are addressed

Leads every interaction to a close sale, which means an order is placed on our online store

Prepares custom quotes, price matches competitors if necessary, and offers custom discounts. This requires calculating margins & ensuring profitability.

Answering questions about the products we offer, including technical questions. Learns the specifications, features and benefits of our bestsellers. Over time, becomes an expert in the industry.

If not able to answer product-specific questions, conducts research in the materials provided by the supplier, or reaches out to the supplier to get the information

Confirms stock availability and lead times when offering products to prospects

Documents standard procedures and best practices in a written form, so that other tea
mbers can learn from them



Requirements:

At least 2 years of experience in sales on the phone

Experience must include both inbound and outbound sales

Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

Experience in Customer Service on the phone is a nice to have

Experience in the e-commerce (online shopping) industry is nice to have

Home improvement, construction, and gas plumbing industry experience is a plus

Outgoing, friendly, and lively

Can-do mindset, with a sense of ownership, pride in your performance, and its impact on the company’s success

Long-term commitment - treat this as your career



What we can offer:

Sales commission: 8% of gross profit from all orders closed. Gross profit means the sale amount minus the product and shipping costs. Paid monthly. No upper limit. Monthly commission payouts range between $1,200 (the guaranteed minimum) and as high as $3,000 (for the top performer). The average monthly payout is $1,465 (average from the last 2 years).

$1,200/month minimum guaranteed pay

15 days paid days off per year (also convertible to min. guaranteed commission)

Paid training on all aspects of the role

Opportunities for professional development

Friendly atmosphere

Online Interview process

Fully remote position

ow to Apply

 Important

 Include the word “LEGACY” in your subject line.

title: Lead Generation & Growth Marketer
description:
Lead Generation & Growth Marketer (Full Time)



Work closely with the founders of two growing SaaS startups and help build our growth engine.



We are looking for a proactive Lead Generation & Growth Marketer to join our team full-time and work directly with the founders of two growing technology platforms.



DealBuddi

An AI-powered platform helping companies improve their sales strategy, build stronger pipelines, and win larger deals.



SixSides

A platform helping organisations and events build stronger communities and engagement.



Both businesses are growing quickly and we are looking for someone who wants to be part of the foundational team and grow with the businesses long term.



This role goes beyond simple task execution.



You will work closely with the founders to create and execute growth strategies across both businesses.



About the Role



Your main mission will be helping us build and execute our lead generation and growth strategies.



You will work closely with the founders on:



Developing growth strategies



Executing LinkedIn lead generation



Creating content that attracts the right audience

Growing our communities

Research companies and key decision makers

CRM & Pipeline Management



Manage contacts and opportunities in HubSpot



Track outreach activity and responses



Help organise our sales pipeline



Webinar & Event Promotion



Help promote webinars and events



Support registrations and engagement



Assist with follow-up and nurturing



Community Growth

Engage with prospects and partners



Identify opportunities for collaboration



Tools You Will Use



LinkedIn



Apollo



HubSpot



ChatGPT and AI tools



DealBuddi platform



Training will be provided on modern sales strategy and demand generation techniques.



You will learn directly from founders building global SaaS companies.



What We're Looking For



We are looking for someone who is:



Proactive



You take initiative and look for opportunities rather than waiting for instructions.



Growth Minded



You enjoy helping businesses grow and learning modern marketing strategies.



Creative



You enjoy writing content and engaging audiences.



Organised



You can manage pipelines, lists, and tasks effectively.



Long-Term Focused



You want to grow with the company and be part of a team building something meaningful.



Salary & Performance Bonuses



Base Salary:

$1,000 – $1,300 AUD per month



Performance Bonuses (Uncapped)



In addition to the base salary, bonuses are paid when your work contributes to new client growth.



$200 – $500 AUD bonus for each new client converted



Bonuses are uncapped



This means the better our growth engine performs, the more you earn.



High-performing tea
mbers can significantly increase their income as our client base grows.



Work Details



Position: Full Time (40 hours per week)



Timezone:

Must have some overlap with Australian business hours.



Your First 90 Days



In your first three months, you will focus on:



Learning our businesses, products, and ideal customers

Working with the founders to develop our growth strategy

Creating and executing a LinkedIn content strategy

Publishing regular LinkedIn content

Creating regular blog posts

Building targeted prospect lists

Engaging prospects on LinkedIn

Supporting webinar and event promotions

Helping grow our communities and audiences



Your work will directly contribute to building our pipeline and client growth.

title: Industrial Designer (Brand & Product Form)
description:
About the Role

We’re looking for a highly creative Industrial Designer based in the Philippines to help define and evolve the visual identity of our product portfolio across high-end hair tools and power/home improvement tools.

This role focuses on product form, brand expression, CMF, and user experience. You will translate brand strategy into iconic, emotionally compelling physical products that stand out in competitive global markets.

From premium hair dryers to precision power tools, you will shape a cohesive and recognizable design language that defines who we are — while working closely with our product development team to ensure your vision is thoughtfully executed.



Responsibilities

• Lead the form development and aesthetic direction of new products across multiple categories.

• Create a distinctive and consistent design language that strengthens brand recognition.

• Explore concepts through sketching, form studies, ergonomic refinement, and 3D development.

• Develop thoughtful CMF (Color, Material, Finish) strategies aligned with brand positioning.

• Ensure designs consider real-world functionality, usability, and internal component integration.

• Collaborate closely with the product development team to align on feasibility, performance requirements, and manufacturing considerations while maintaining design integrity.

• Produce high-quality renderings and presentation visuals to communicate design intent.

• Conduct trend research and competitive analysis to inform forward-thinking design decisions.

• Contribute to a cohesive product ecosystem across SKUs and categories.



What We’re Looking For

• Strong portfolio demonstrating brand-led product design, form exploration, and CMF expertise.

• Experience designing consumer products (beauty, electronics, tools, home goods, lifestyle products, etc.).

• Exceptional understanding of proportion, ergonomics, surface development, and user interaction.

• Ability to balance aesthetics, functionality, and manufacturability.

• Strong sketching skills (digital or hand).

• Proficiency in 3D modeling and rendering tools such as Rhino, SolidWorks, Fusion 360, KeyShot, or similar.

• Clear communication skills and experience collaborating with cross-functional teams.



How to Apply

Please submit your portfolio showcasing concept sketches, form development, CMF exploration, and final product renderings.

We’re looking for designers who create products people recognize instantly — before they even see the logo.



What you'll get

Competitive Salary – Earn in USD!

Health Coverage (HMO) – Enjoy peace of mind after one year!

Paid Time Off – Because work-life balance matters!

title: Outbound Sales Representative (Appointment Setter)
description:
WHO WE ARE

Revenue Doctor is a revenue and automation company founded by a physician with executive healthcare leadership and AI strategy experience. We help businesses increase revenue through automation, lead capture, and follow-up systems.



We are building a high-performance outbound team focused on generating qualified opportunities.







THE ROLE

This is a remote outbound sales and appointment setting role.



Your primary responsibility is to:

	•	reach out to business owners

	•	qualify prospects

	•	book qualified calls for our senior closer



You are not responsible for closing deals. Your focus is generating consistent, high-quality pipeline.





WHAT YOU WILL DO

	•	Conduct outbound outreach 
, SMS, calls, and social) to business owners

	•	Start conversations and build initial interest

	•	Qualify prospects using defined criteria

	•	Book qualified calls on the calendar

	•	Follow up persistently with leads until they convert or are disqualified

	•	Track all activity in CRM





DAILY EXPECTATIONS

	•	100 to 200 outbound touches per day

	•	Consistent follow-up on all active conversations

	•	Minimum daily booking targets (set during onboarding)





REQUIREMENTS

	•	Strong spoken and written English

	•	Comfortable communicating with US-based business owners

	•	Highly disciplined and consistent

	•	Able to follow scripts and processes closely

	•	Sales or outreach experience preferred but not required





COMPENSATION

	•	Base pay (based on experience)

	•	Pay per qualified call that shows up

	•	Bonus for deals closed from your booked calls



High performers can earn significantly by generating consistent pipeline.





HOW TO APPLY

Answer these four questions in your own words. Keep answers short and based on real experience.



Question 1 — Describe any experience you have with outreach, sales, or working with business owners.

Question 2 — If a prospect stops responding after you’ve reached out multiple times, what would you do next and why.

Question 3 — Give an example of a short outreach message you would send to a business owner.

Question 4 — Describe your English speaking and writing ability honestly.





This role requires high daily activity and consistency. If you are not comfortable with outbound work and follow-up, do not apply.

title: Operations & Content VA (Tech-Savvy)
description:
Role Overview



We are looking for a highly reliable and tech-savvy Operations & Content VA to support day-to-day execution across outbound campaigns, podcast production, and operational workflows.



This role is ideal for someone who is organized, resourceful, and comfortable working with modern tools and AI assistants to independently solve problems and keep systems running smoothly.



The VA will play an important role in managing outbound campaigns, producing podcast content, and supporting operational workflows across multiple client projects.



Core Responsibilities

1. Outbound Campaign Monitoring (Primary Focus)



Monitor and manage outbound campaigns using tools such as Dripify.



Responsibilities include:



Reviewing daily campaign activity



Responding to incoming prospect messages



Flagging qualified leads



Escalating important conversations



Ensuring campaigns run smoothly for internal and client outreach



2. Podcast Production & Publishing



Support the production of approximately 20–25 podcast episodes per month.



Responsibilities include:



Light podcast editing (basic cuts, filler removal, cleanup)



Creating YouTube thumbnails using Canva



Exporting and preparing final video/audio files



Publishing episodes to YouTube podcast channels



Creating 2–3 short clips/highlights per episode for social media



3. Operational Reporting



Maintain operational tracking systems and reporting dashboards.



Responsibilities include:



Updating weekly KPI dashboards



Maintaining Google Sheets or Notion tracking systems



Ensuring operational data is accurate and up-to-date



4. Growth Plan Preparation



Assist with documenting strategy and planning materials.



Responsibilities include:



Reviewing transcripts and meeting recordings



Compiling information into structured first drafts



Formatting growth plans and internal documentation



5. Client Infrastructure Setup (Light Technical Tasks)



Assist with basic setup of tools and platforms when onboarding new clients.



Examples include:



Setting up domains



Creating Google Workspace environments



Setting up YouTube channels



Connecting marketing tools or automation platforms



6. Inbox Monitoring



Review inbox activity for AI SDR systems and client communication.



Responsibilities include:



Monitoring flagged
s



Drafting simple replies



Escalating important messages



Role Essentials



Highly resourceful problem-solver who can independently find solutions using tools such as ChatGPT, Google, and documentation



Strong execution skills and attention to detail



Experience managing digital tools such as Google Workspace, YouTube, and CRM platforms



Familiarity with outreach or automation tools (Dripify, LinkedIn automation,
 tools)



Basic video editing skills



Strong organizational ability and task management



Clear written communication for operational follow-ups



High ownership mindset and reliability



Nice-to-Haves



Experience supporting founders, consultants, or agencies



Familiarity with AI-assisted workflows



Experience with podcast production workflows



Experience with growth marketing or outbound systems



Familiarity with Notion, Google Sheets, or KPI dashboards



Experience working remotely with distributed teams



KPIs / Success Metrics



Success in this role will be measured by:



• Consistent monitoring and management of outbound campaigns

• Timely responses and proper lead flagging

• Editing and publishing 20–25 podcast episodes monthly

• Producing 2–3 short clips per episode

• Accurate and consistent KPI dashboard updates

• Timely preparation of growth plan drafts

• Reliable operational execution with minimal supervision



Ideal Candidate - a proactive, highly organized, and tech-savvy Operations & Content VA who thrives in a fast-paced, execution-focused environment. They are comfortable wearing multiple hats and can independently manage tasks across outbound campaigns, podcast production, and operational reporting.



Key traits include:

- Execution-Oriented: Can take ownership of tasks from start to finish with minimal guidance.

- Tech-Savvy: Comfortable navigating tools like Dripify, Google Workspace, YouTube, Canva, and basic automation platforms.

- Content Competent: Able to perform light podcast editing, create thumbnails, and produce short social clips efficiently.

- Process-Focused: Maintains organized systems, dashboards, and documentation for easy tracking and reporting.

- Detail-Oriented: Ensures accuracy in operational tasks, KPIs, and campaign monitoring.

- Proactive Communicator: Flags important items, provides timely updates, and anticipates needs before being asked.

- Adaptable & Resourceful: Can troubleshoot issues, find solutions independently, and quickly learn new tools or workflows.

- Collaborative & Professional: Works well with distributed teams and supports multiple client projects without losing focus or quality.



In short, this person is a reliable, versatile operator who ensures smooth day-to-day execution while contributing to business growth, freeing leadership to focus on strategic priorities.



Hiring Process:

- Round 1: Interview with Talent Team (Skills + Experience Assessment).

- Round 2: Interview with Hiring Manager (Project Scope + Compensation Discussion).

title: Podcast Manager
description:
We’re a podcast marketing and production agency that helps coaches, entrepreneurs, and thought leaders grow through high-quality podcasts and repurposed content. We manage everything from recording to publishing and promotion.



We’re looking for an Podcast Manager who knows podcast production inside out. You’ll oversee projects from start to finish, keep things running smoothly, and make sure every episode, short, and caption meets our quality standards.



About the Role

You’ll manage client communication, production timelines, and creative review. You’ll check titles, show notes, video edits, and clips before they go live. You’ll also help choose snippets for reels or shorts and make sure content aligns with SEO and brand strategy. Whenever necessary, you'll hop in and help with the workflow (ie editing, show notes, graphics, etc)



Responsibilities



• Manage podcast production workflows and deadlines



• Communicate with clients, handle updates, and gather feedback



• Review and approve all creative assets (audio, video, copy, thumbnails)



• Select or suggest video snippets for repurposing



• Check titles, captions, and show notes for clarity, engagement, and SEO



• Coordinate with editors, designers, and writers



• Keep Trello organized and up to date



• Ensure brand consistency and quality across all episodes and channels



• Help the team as needed to keep the workflow going





You’re a Good Fit If You Have



• Solid experience managing podcast production or working in a podcast agency



• Strong understanding of podcast formats, storytelling, and audience engagement



• Excellent eye for detail — you catch things others miss



• Strong English writing and communication skills



• Ability to give constructive feedback on copy, visuals, and edits



• Knowledge of SEO and content optimization



• Great organization and follow-through



• Experience with YouTube optimization (titles, thumbnails, tags)



• Familiarity with content repurposing for social platforms



if this is you, please apply here

title: Amazon Compliance Specialist
description:
Regulatory & Legal Compliance



Conduct in-depth research on FDA, EPA, FTC, and other relevant federal and state regulations.

Ensure compliance with international product safety standards (EU, UK, Canada, Asia-Pacific) when applicable.

Perform ongoing monitoring of regulatory updates and interpret implications for product categories.

Support intellectual property due diligence to prevent patent, copyright, or trademark infringement.



Risk Management & Product Compliance



Evaluate new and existing products for compliance risks and advise stakeholders on mitigation strategies.

Develop compliance testing protocols and coordinate with third-party labs and certification agencies.

Manage corrective actions, recalls, or withdrawals in alignment with Amazon’s policies and legal requirements.

Conduct audits of product listings and seller submissions to prevent unlawful or restricted product selection.



Cross-Functional Collaboration



Partner with Product Development, Supply Chain, and Seller Performance teams to execute compliance initiatives.

Provide clear guidance to vendors, suppliers, and internal teams on compliance requirements.

Train cross-functional stakeholders on compliance best practices and emerging regulatory risks.

Act as a subject matter expert to business teams during product launches, regulatory reviews, and inspections.



Policy & Process Development



Draft and implement compliance procedures, standard operating protocols (SOPs), and escalation processes.

Support automation and system-based compliance controls to scale monitoring and enforcement.

Contribute to internal policy development regarding restricted products, product claims, and safety certifications.

Continuously improve workflows to enhance accuracy, timeliness, and audit readiness.



Documentation & Reporting



Maintain accurate records of compliance assessments, approvals, and regulatory correspondence.

Prepare detailed reports and risk assessments for leadership review.

Provide supervisors with regular feedback on task progress, emerging risks, and resolution status.

Ensure confidentiality of sensitive data, supplier information, and Amazon business strategy.





Experience interacting directly with regulators including federal and state agencies

Experience in research and analyzing federal and state regulations

Familiarity and experience in dealing with FDA regulation is REQUIRED

Familiarity with international compliance frameworks (REACH, RoHS, CE marking).

Experience in compliance auditing, regulatory affairs, or legal review.

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with attention to detail.

Excellent communication skills for engaging with global teams and regulators.

Ability to handle multiple projects in a fast-paced environment with strict deadline

title: Online Math/Science Teacher(Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

title: Automation Developer (GeeLark + Python) – Snapchat Account Farm
description:
We are looking for a technical automation expert to set up a high-volume Snapchat Account Creation Farm. We use GeeLark (Cloud Mobile Phones) to provide the Android environment and already have a base Python script (Selenium/Playwright) for the creation logic. Your job is to integrate the two, ensuring the bot can create accounts at scale while bypassing Snapchat’s mobile security.



Key Responsibilities:

GeeLark Integration: Connect our Python creation script to GeeLark’s Remote Debugging Port or REST API to control cloud Android instances.



Automated Creation Flow: Finalize the bot logic to handle:



Auto-filling user data and credentials.



Managing SMS verification via API (e.g., 5SIM, SMS-Activate).



Handling CAPTCHA solving within the GeeLark environment.



Fingerprint Optimization: Ensure each created account has a unique, high-trust mobile fingerprint (IMEI, MAC, Device Model) provided by GeeLark.



Proxy Configuration: Properly assign Rotating 5G Mobile Proxies to each GeeLark profile during the creation process.



Stress Testing: Successfully create and verify a batch of 10+ accounts as a "Proof of Concept."



Required Technical Skills:

GeeLark Expert: Must have experience using GeeLark’s API for profile management and cloud phone control.



Python Mastery: Expert in Selenium, Appium, or Playwright for interacting with mobile apps/web.



Anti-Detect Knowledge: Understanding of how mobile-first platforms (like Snapchat) detect emulators and how to use GeeLark to look like a real device.



API Integration: Experience connecting to SMS and CAPTCHA solving services.



How to Apply:

Please send a message with the subject line "GeeLark Specialist: [Your Name]" and answer these 3 questions:



Have you successfully automated Snapchat account creation before?



Do you know how to connect a local Python script to a GeeLark cloud phone via the debugging port?



Which SMS service do you recommend for the highest success rate with Snapchat?

2) How many clients profiles can you dispute in one day?

4) What's the fastest you have been able to remove items from client's reports?

5) How do you handle inquiry removal?

6) Do you know a 4-day collection removal method?

7)How do you handle bankruptcies?

8) What softwares have you used for disputing?



Add anything else that you are proud of and that would be good for this position.

title: Operations Assistant – Website & Content Administration (Remote)
description:
We are looking for a reliable Operations Assistant to support the day-to-day systems of a growing website-based business.



This role focuses heavily on administration, organisation, and completing tasks carefully. The majority of the work involves managing website content, organising files, and maintaining operational processes.



This is not a creative marketing role. It is best suited to someone who enjoys structured work, checklists, and making sure details are correct.



You will work closely with our operations coordinator who manages the workflow and assigns tasks.



---



Key Responsibilities



Website Content Administration  

• Upload and format articles in WordPress  

• Insert and check internal and external links  

• Upload images and ensure formatting is correct  

• Prepare posts for publishing



Content Scheduling  

• Write short titles and descriptions for posts  

• Schedule content using online tools  

• Check that links and images are working correctly



Administrative Organisation  

• Organise files in OneDrive and Dropbox  

• Maintain spreadsheets and tracking systems  

• Perform data entry and operational tasks  

• Assist with maintaining digital workflows



Quality Checks  

• Review content before publishing to ensure links, formatting, and images are correct  

• Follow checklists carefully to avoid mistakes  

• Flag anything unusual or unclear



---



This Role Is Best For Someone Who:



• enjoys organised and structured work  

• is detail-oriented and careful with tasks  

• is comfortable following checklists and processes  

• communicates clearly in written English  

• prefers administrative or operational work rather than creative work



---



Requirements



• Reliable internet connection  

• Comfortable using online tools and spreadsheets  

• Ability to follow written instructions carefully



Experience with WordPress or managing website content is highly beneficial but not required. Training will be provided.



---



Application Instructions



Please include the word “system” at the top of your application so we know you read the full description.





In your message, please answer the following:

What sort of past work or roles have you found most enjoyable?

Do you have a preferred working or communication style that would make it easier for us to collaborate?

Tell us about yourself - e.g. family life, hobbies, interests, sports, friends, volunteering - what activities do you love to do outside of work.

What are your career aspirations for the next 1-2 years?

What are your personal aspirations for the future?





Tools & Systems Experience



Please rank your experience with the following tools from 1–5



1 – No experience  

2 – Basic familiarity  

3 – Some experience  

4 – Comfortable using regularly  

5 – Advanced / expert



If you have not used a tool before, simply write 1. Note - on the job training will be provided, so none of these are essential, but may be beneficial. If you feel you would be a good fit for the role, please apply even if you do not have experience.



---



Website & Content Management



WordPress  

Uploading and formatting blog posts in WordPress  

Inserting links and images within WordPress  

Working with recipe plugins (such as WP Recipe Maker or similar)



---



Project & Task Management



ClickUp  

Working with task management systems in general



---



File Organisation & Storage



Dropbox  

Microsoft OneDrive  

Organising files and folders for a business



---



Content Scheduling & Social Tools



SmarterQueue  

Meta Business Suite  

Pinterest scheduling tools (Tailwind or similar)  

Social media scheduling tools in general



---



Analytics & Research Tools



Google Analytics

SEMrush or Ahrefs



---



Spreadsheets



Microsoft Excel



If you use Excel, please briefly list which formulas you are familiar with (for example: SUM, AVERAGE, IF, VLOOKUP, etc.)



---



Basic Content Editing Tools

title: Cold Caller / Appointment Setter For Medspa Marketing Agency

title: Sales Operations Project Manager
description:
Base: 80,000 PHP/month + Performance Bonus

Wellness Day Off after probation



We’re looking for a strong, proactive Sales Operations Project Manager who can lead a sales pod, drive accountability across closers and setters, and maintain seamless communication between Sales, Growth Ops, and Tech Ops.



This is a leadership and coordination role — you are the operational backbone that ensures the pod performs at a high level, SOPs are followed, data is accurate, and every tea
mber stays aligned and supported. If you’re the kind of person who naturally takes ownership, thrives in fast-paced environments, and knows how to communicate with clarity and authority, you’ll excel here.



This is a full-time position, requiring consistent availability from 8am to 4pm Eastern Time, with solid internet, power, and backup.



All applicants must complete DISC and IQ assessments before applying.



?



Detailed Job Description Breakdown



Pod Leadership & Daily Operations

• Lead and manage the daily workflow of closers and setters to ensure the sales pod operates smoothly.

• Run daily huddles, weekly check-ins, and pipeline reviews with clear agendas and follow-through.

• Manage pod-level projects (e.g., SOP rollouts, funnel changes, tracking fixes) end-to-end, ensuring on-time execution.

• Monitor pod performance, identify bottlenecks early, and escalate issues with solutions—not problems.

• Own the onboarding and offboarding process for new sales staff, including systems access, SOP orientation, and performance expectations.

• Ensure all pod members maintain clean calendars, proper availability, and updated CRM/task workflows.



Quality Assurance, Accountability & Compliance

• Hold closers and setters accountable for submitting accurate EODs, updating dispositions, and following SOPs consistently.

• Conduct quality checks on sales calls, calendar availability, CRM hygiene, and follow-up sequences.

• Audit all sales data regularly (bookings, show rates, sales, payments, renewals) to ensure accuracy before reporting.

• Flag performance gaps early and coach tea
mbers with clarity, empathy, and firmness.

• Ensure all pod documentation, scorecards, and checklists are consistently maintained and up to date.



Cross-Department Coordination

• Work directly with Front-End Tech Ops, Back-End Automation Specialists, and Growth Ops to resolve tech issues, data discrepancies, or workflow breakdowns.

• Communicate updates clearly and quickly across all stakeholders — closers, setters, Growth Ops, SOMs, Tech Ops, and leadership.

• Serve as the bridge for multi-team projects (automation fixes, tracking repairs, new funnels, offer migrations).

• Maintain a strong working relationship with salespeople (who may be impatient or stressed under pressure) while keeping communication tight, professional, and steady.



Reporting & Performance Management

• Prepare weekly and monthly performance reports for leadership, ensuring all numbers are accurate and validated.

• Track KPIs across the full funnel: leads ? setters ? calls ? sales ? renewals.

• Support leadership in evaluating pod performance, identifying improvement plans, and implementing corrective action.

• Ensure the sales pod meets revenue, activity, and quality targets consistently.



?



Skills & Qualifications

• Project Management experience is mandatory.

(Comfortable managing timelines, action items, dependencies, and follow-through across multiple teams.)

• At least 1–2 years experience in sales operations, sales admin, sales coordination, or a similar leadership/ops role.

• Strong leadership and interpersonal skills — able to hold people accountable with firmness and empathy.

• Excellent verbal and written communication; comfortable leading huddles, giving feedback, and jumping on calls.

• Highly organized, detail-driven, and able to manage multiple moving parts in a fast-paced environment.

• Tech-savvy and comfortable navigating CRM, calendar tools, funnels, spreadsheets, and SOPs.

• Experience working with sales teams (closers/setters) is strongly preferred.

• Solution-oriented, proactive, and able to anticipate problems before they happen.

• Thrives in an environment where communication, speed, and ownership are non-negotiable.



?



If this sounds like you…



If you love driving clarity, supporting high-performance teams, and being the operational heartbeat of a fast-moving sales pod, we’d love to meet you. This role is perfect for someone who wants to grow into higher-level ops leadership while playing a mission-critical role in our sales organization.



?



About Sales Possible



At Sales Possible, we partner with mission-driven online coaching companies to build world-class marketing and sales ecosystems. We’re not just a sales team provider — we architect full-funnel systems, optimize performance, and support our clients with cutting-edge automation, AI, and operations infrastructure.



We work with high-growth education brands and expert coaches, helping them scale sustainably while delivering exceptional customer experiences.



We’re a fast-moving, tight-knit team that values ownership, proactive communication, and continuous improvement. If you want to work in an environment obsessed with growth, clarity, and performance — you’ll feel right at home here.

title: Estimator I
description:
We are seeking a detail oriented and analytical Estimator I to collaborate with us on a contract basis. The ideal contractor will serve as the critical link between architectural plans and the actual build, dissecting blueprints, identifying materials needed for fabrication, and helping define the scope of work for each trade.



If you have a knack for catching details in plans that others miss and can translate drawings into precise material and labor lists, we would like to hear from you.

Scope of Services



The contractor will provide the following services on a project by project basis:



1. Plan Review & Quantity Take Offs

Interpret architectural, structural, and shop drawings to understand project scope. Use Bluebeam Revu or similar software to perform detailed digital quantity take offs. Prepare Quantity Take Off Sheets that break down project components by trade and material type.



2. Material Take Off for Fabrication

Identify materials destined for off site fabrication versus on site installation. Prepare cut lists, fabrication take offs, and material schedules, specifying material grades, dimensions, finishes, and quantities required for ordering and procurement.



3. Scope of Work Support

Assist in defining the Scope of Work for each trade package, helping to ensure alignment between drawings and bid documents. Identify discrepancies, ambiguities, or grey areas in the plans and communicate them to the Project Manager for review and resolution.



4. Trade Identification & Coordination

Analyze plans to determine which specific trades are required for each phase of the project (for example, rough carpentry, structural steel, drywall, millwork). Organize quantity take offs by trade to support clear bid packages for subcontractors. Provide input on which portions of work may fall under the original contract versus potential Time & Materials (T&M) work.



5. Basic CAD Navigation

Utilize basic AutoCAD skills to open drawing files, navigate layers, and take measurements directly from digital plans. (Note: The contractor will not be creating or modifying drawings, only navigating files and extracting dimensional data.)



6. Request for Information (RFI) Support

As you review plans and identify discrepancies, ambiguities, or missing information, you will be expected to initiate and draft RFIs (Requests for Information) to clarify issues before bidding or construction begins. This ensures that assumptions are not made and that all trades are bidding on the same scope of work.



Your role includes:



    Identifying plan inconsistencies or missing details that require clarification



    Drafting clear, professional RFIs, one question per RFI, with specific drawing references



    Attaching markups or screenshots to support each question



    Suggesting a potential solution when appropriate to help move the process forward



We provide simple, ready to use RFI templates (for general clarification, material/fabrication questions, and trade scope coordination) so you can focus on the technical work, not formatting.



Qualifications & Requirements



    Experience: 0 to 2 years of US based quantity surveying or construction estimating experience

    Bluebeam: Proficiency required. Please indicate your level and include Bluebeam samples

    Excel: Strong proficiency in LibreOffice Calc, Microsoft Excel, Zoho Sheets, or Google Sheets

    CAD: Basic AutoCAD navigation skills (open files, measure, navigate layers)

    Equipment: Reliable personal computer and stable high speed internet connection

    English: Strong written communication skills for documenting scope notes clearly and communicating with Estimators



Application Requirements



Please include the following with your application:



1. Resume

Submit an up to date resume highlighting your experience in construction estimating, quantity surveying, or related roles. Please emphasize your proficiency with Bluebeam, Excel, and any relevant software.



2. Work Samples

Attach examples of construction quantity take offs and material take offs you have prepared. These can be:



    Screenshots or PDFs of take offs done in Bluebeam or similar software



    Excel spreadsheets showing quantity calculations and material lists



    Samples of scope of work documents you have helped prepare



(Note: You may remove confidential information such as project names, client details, or pricing.)



3. AI Experience (Encouraged)

We value efficiency and innovation. If you have used AI tools (Deepseek, Mistral AI, ChatGPT, etc.) to assist with estimating related tasks, please share one specific example of how it helped you work faster, smarter, or more accurately.

Why Work With Us?



    Project Availability: We maintain a steady pipeline of commercial and residential projects. Contractors who perform well can expect ongoing assignments.

    Flexibility: Set your own schedule and work from anywhere in the Philippines.

    Growth: Opportunity for long term collaboration as our project volume grows.

    Modern Approach: We embrace technology and innovation, including AI, to work smarter.
